  "oldString": "\t\t\t| HEADER_P\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"header\", (Node *) makeBoolean(true), @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| QUOTE opt_as Sconst",
  "originalFile": "%{\n\n/*#define YYDEBUG 1*/\n/*-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n *\n * gram.y\n *\t  POSTGRESQL BISON rules/actions\n *\n * Portions Copyright (c) 1996-2025, PostgreSQL Global Development Group\n * Portions Copyright (c) 1994, Regents of the University of California\n *\n *\n * IDENTIFICATION\n *\t  src/backend/parser/gram.y\n *\n * HISTORY\n *\t  AUTHOR\t\t\tDATE\t\t\tMAJOR EVENT\n *\t  Andrew Yu\t\t\tSept, 1994\t\tPOSTQUEL to SQL conversion\n *\t  Andrew Yu\t\t\tOct, 1994\t\tlispy code conversion\n *\n * NOTES\n *\t  CAPITALS are used to represent terminal symbols.\n *\t  non-capitals are used to represent non-terminals.\n *\n *\t  In general, nothing in this file should initiate database accesses\n *\t  nor depend on changeable state (such as SET variables).  If you do\n *\t  database accesses, your code will fail when we have aborted the\n *\t  current transaction and are just parsing commands to find the next\n *\t  ROLLBACK or COMMIT.  If you make use of SET variables, then you\n *\t  will do the wrong thing in multi-query strings like this:\n *\t\t\tSET constraint_exclusion TO off; SELECT * FROM foo;\n *\t  because the entire string is parsed by gram.y before the SET gets\n *\t  executed.  Anything that depends on the database or changeable state\n *\t  should be handled during parse analysis so that it happens at the\n *\t  right time not the wrong time.\n *\n * WARNINGS\n *\t  If you use a list, make sure the datum is a node so that the printing\n *\t  routines work.\n *\n *\t  Sometimes we assign constants to makeStrings. Make sure we don't free\n *\t  those.\n *\n *-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n */\n#include \"postgres.h\"\n\n#include <ctype.h>\n#include <limits.h>\n\n#include \"catalog/index.h\"\n#include \"catalog/namespace.h\"\n#include \"catalog/pg_am.h\"\n#include \"catalog/pg_trigger.h\"\n#include \"commands/defrem.h\"\n#include \"commands/trigger.h\"\n#include \"gramparse.h\"\n#include \"nodes/makefuncs.h\"\n#include \"nodes/nodeFuncs.h\"\n#include \"parser/parser.h\"\n#include \"utils/datetime.h\"\n#include \"utils/xml.h\"\n\n\n/*\n * Location tracking support.  Unlike bison's default, we only want\n * to track the start position not the end position of each nonterminal.\n * Nonterminals that reduce to empty receive position \"-1\".  Since a\n * production's leading RHS nonterminal(s) may have reduced to empty,\n * we have to scan to find the first one that's not -1.\n */\n#define YYLLOC_DEFAULT(Current, Rhs, N) \\\n\tdo { \\\n\t\t(Current) = (-1); \\\n\t\tfor (int _i = 1; _i <= (N); _i++) \\\n\t\t{ \\\n\t\t\tif ((Rhs)[_i] >= 0) \\\n\t\t\t{ \\\n\t\t\t\t(Current) = (Rhs)[_i]; \\\n\t\t\t\tbreak; \\\n\t\t\t} \\\n\t\t} \\\n\t} while (0)\n\n/*\n * Bison doesn't allocate anything that needs to live across parser calls,\n * so we can easily have it use palloc instead of malloc.  This prevents\n * memory leaks if we error out during parsing.\n */\n#define YYMALLOC palloc\n#define YYFREE   pfree\n\n/* Private struct for the result of privilege_target production */\ntypedef struct PrivTarget\n{\n\tGrantTargetType targtype;\n\tObjectType\tobjtype;\n\tList\t   *objs;\n} PrivTarget;\n\n/* Private struct for the result of import_qualification production */\ntypedef struct ImportQual\n{\n\tImportForeignSchemaType type;\n\tList\t   *table_names;\n} ImportQual;\n\n/* Private struct for the result of select_limit & limit_clause productions */\ntypedef struct SelectLimit\n{\n\tNode\t   *limitOffset;\n\tNode\t   *limitCount;\n\tLimitOption limitOption;\t/* indicates presence of WITH TIES */\n\tParseLoc\toffsetLoc;\t\t/* location of OFFSET token, if present */\n\tParseLoc\tcountLoc;\t\t/* location of LIMIT/FETCH token, if present */\n\tParseLoc\toptionLoc;\t\t/* location of WITH TIES, if present */\n} SelectLimit;\n\n/* Private struct for the result of group_clause production */\ntypedef struct GroupClause\n{\n\tbool\t\tdistinct;\n\tList\t   *list;\n} GroupClause;\n\n/* Private structs for the result of key_actions and key_action productions */\ntypedef struct KeyAction\n{\n\tchar\t\taction;\n\tList\t   *cols;\n} KeyAction;\n\ntypedef struct KeyActions\n{\n\tKeyAction *updateAction;\n\tKeyAction *deleteAction;\n} KeyActions;\n\n/* ConstraintAttributeSpec yields an integer bitmask of these flags: */\n#define CAS_NOT_DEFERRABLE\t\t\t0x01\n#define CAS_DEFERRABLE\t\t\t\t0x02\n#define CAS_INITIALLY_IMMEDIATE\t\t0x04\n#define CAS_INITIALLY_DEFERRED\t\t0x08\n#define CAS_NOT_VALID\t\t\t\t0x10\n#define CAS_NO_INHERIT\t\t\t\t0x20\n#define CAS_NOT_ENFORCED\t\t\t0x40\n#define CAS_ENFORCED\t\t\t\t0x80\n\n\n#define parser_yyerror(msg)  scanner_yyerror(msg, yyscanner)\n#define parser_errposition(pos)  scanner_errposition(pos, yyscanner)\n\nstatic void base_yyerror(YYLTYPE *yylloc, core_yyscan_t yyscanner,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t const char *msg);\nstatic RawStmt *makeRawStmt(Node *stmt, int stmt_location);\nstatic void updateRawStmtEnd(RawStmt *rs, int end_location);\nstatic Node *makeColumnRef(char *colname, List *indirection,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t   int location, core_yyscan_t yyscanner);\nstatic Node *makeTypeCast(Node *arg, TypeName *typename, int location);\nstatic Node *makeStringConstCast(char *str, int location, TypeName *typename);\nstatic Node *makeIntConst(int val, int location);\nstatic Node *makeFloatConst(char *str, int location);\nstatic Node *makeBoolAConst(bool state, int location);\nstatic Node *makeBitStringConst(char *str, int location);\nstatic Node *makeNullAConst(int location);\nstatic Node *makeAConst(Node *v, int location);\nstatic RoleSpec *makeRoleSpec(RoleSpecType type, int location);\nstatic void check_qualified_name(List *names, core_yyscan_t yyscanner);\nstatic List *check_func_name(List *names, core_yyscan_t yyscanner);\nstatic List *check_indirection(List *indirection, core_yyscan_t yyscanner);\nstatic List *extractArgTypes(List *parameters);\nstatic List *extractAggrArgTypes(List *aggrargs);\nstatic List *makeOrderedSetArgs(List *directargs, List *orderedargs,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tcore_yyscan_t yyscanner);\nstatic void insertSelectOptions(SelectStmt *stmt,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tList *sortClause, List *lockingClause,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tSelectLimit *limitClause,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tWithClause *withClause,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tcore_yyscan_t yyscanner);\nstatic Node *makeSetOp(SetOperation op, bool all, Node *larg, Node *rarg);\nstatic Node *doNegate(Node *n, int location);\nstatic void doNegateFloat(Float *v);\nstatic Node *makeAndExpr(Node *lexpr, Node *rexpr, int location);\nstatic Node *makeOrExpr(Node *lexpr, Node *rexpr, int location);\nstatic Node *makeNotExpr(Node *expr, int location);\nstatic Node *makeAArrayExpr(List *elements, int location, int end_location);\nstatic Node *makeSQLValueFunction(SQLValueFunctionOp op, int32 typmod,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t  int location);\nstatic Node *makeXmlExpr(XmlExprOp op, char *name, List *named_args,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t List *args, int location);\nstatic List *mergeTableFuncParameters(List *func_args, List *columns, core_yyscan_t yyscanner);\nstatic TypeName *TableFuncTypeName(List *columns);\nstatic RangeVar *makeRangeVarFromAnyName(List *names, int position, core_yyscan_t yyscanner);\nstatic RangeVar *makeRangeVarFromQualifiedName(char *name, List *namelist, int location,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t   core_yyscan_t yyscanner);\nstatic void SplitColQualList(List *qualList,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t List **constraintList, CollateClause **collClause,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t core_yyscan_t yyscanner);\nstatic void processCASbits(int cas_bits, int location, const char *constrType,\n\t\t\t   bool *deferrable, bool *initdeferred, bool *is_enforced,\n\t\t\t   bool *not_valid, bool *no_inherit, core_yyscan_t yyscanner);\nstatic PartitionStrategy parsePartitionStrategy(char *strategy, int location,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tcore_yyscan_t yyscanner);\nstatic void preprocess_pubobj_list(List *pubobjspec_list,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t   core_yyscan_t yyscanner);\nstatic Node *makeRecursiveViewSelect(char *relname, List *aliases, Node *query);\n\n%}\n\n%pure-parser\n%expect 0\n%name-prefix=\"base_yy\"\n%locations\n\n%parse-param {core_yyscan_t yyscanner}\n%lex-param   {core_yyscan_t yyscanner}\n\n%union\n{\n\tcore_YYSTYPE core_yystype;\n\t/* these fields must match core_YYSTYPE: */\n\tint\t\t\tival;\n\tchar\t   *str;\n\tconst char *keyword;\n\n\tchar\t\tchr;\n\tbool\t\tboolean;\n\tJoinType\tjtype;\n\tDropBehavior dbehavior;\n\tOnCommitAction oncommit;\n\tList\t   *list;\n\tNode\t   *node;\n\tObjectType\tobjtype;\n\tTypeName   *typnam;\n\tFunctionParameter *fun_param;\n\tFunctionParameterMode fun_param_mode;\n\tObjectWithArgs *objwithargs;\n\tDefElem\t   *defelt;\n\tSortBy\t   *sortby;\n\tWindowDef  *windef;\n\tJoinExpr   *jexpr;\n\tIndexElem  *ielem;\n\tStatsElem  *selem;\n\tAlias\t   *alias;\n\tRangeVar   *range;\n\tIntoClause *into;\n\tWithClause *with;\n\tInferClause\t*infer;\n\tOnConflictClause *onconflict;\n\tA_Indices  *aind;\n\tResTarget  *target;\n\tstruct PrivTarget *privtarget;\n\tAccessPriv *accesspriv;\n\tstruct ImportQual *importqual;\n\tInsertStmt *istmt;\n\tVariableSetStmt *vsetstmt;\n\tPartitionElem *partelem;\n\tPartitionSpec *partspec;\n\tPartitionBoundSpec *partboundspec;\n\tRoleSpec   *rolespec;\n\tPublicationObjSpec *publicationobjectspec;\n\tstruct SelectLimit *selectlimit;\n\tSetQuantifier setquantifier;\n\tstruct GroupClause *groupclause;\n\tMergeMatchKind mergematch;\n\tMergeWhenClause *mergewhen;\n\tstruct KeyActions *keyactions;\n\tstruct KeyAction *keyaction;\n\tReturningClause *retclause;\n\tReturningOptionKind retoptionkind;\n}\n\n%type <node>\tstmt toplevel_stmt schema_stmt routine_body_stmt\n\t\tAlterEventTrigStmt AlterCollationStmt\n\t\tAlterDatabaseStmt AlterDatabaseSetStmt AlterDomainStmt AlterEnumStmt\n\t\tAlterFdwStmt AlterForeignServerStmt AlterGroupStmt\n\t\tAlterObjectDependsStmt AlterObjectSchemaStmt AlterOwnerStmt\n\t\tAlterOperatorStmt AlterTypeStmt AlterSeqStmt AlterSystemStmt AlterStatsStmt\n\t\tAlterDefaultPrivilegesStmt DefACLAction\n\t\tAnalyzeStmt CallStmt ClosePortalStmt ClusterStmt CommentStmt\n\t\tConstraintsSetStmt CopyStmt CreateAsStmt CreateCastStmt\n\t\tCreateDomainStmt CreateExtensionStmt CreateGroupStmt CreateOpClassStmt\n\t\tCreateOpFamilyStmt AlterOpFamilyStmt CreatePLangStmt\n\t\tCreateSchemaStmt CreateSeqStmt CreateStmt CreateEventTrigStmt\n\t\tCreateUserStmt CreateUserMappingStmt CreateRoleStmt CreatePolicyStmt\n\t\tCreatedbStmt DeclareCursorStmt DefineStmt DeleteStmt DiscardStmt DoStmt\n\t\tDropOpClassStmt DropOpFamilyStmt DropStmt\n\t\tDropCastStmt DropRoleStmt\n\t\tDropdbStmt DropTableSpaceStmt\n\t\tDropTransformStmt\n\t\tDropUserMappingStmt ExplainStmt FetchStmt\n\t\tGrantStmt GrantRoleStmt ImportForeignSchemaStmt IndexStmt InsertStmt\n\t\tListenStmt LoadStmt LockStmt MergeStmt NotifyStmt ExplainableStmt PreparableStmt\n\t\tCreateFunctionStmt AlterFunctionStmt ReindexStmt RemoveAggrStmt\n\t\tRemoveFuncStmt RemoveOperStmt RenameStmt ReturnStmt RevokeStmt RevokeRoleStmt\n\t\tRuleActionStmt RuleActionStmtOrEmpty RuleStmt\n\t\tSecLabelStmt SelectStmt TransactionStmt TransactionStmtLegacy TruncateStmt\n\t\tUnlistenStmt UpdateStmt VacuumStmt\n\t\tVariableResetStmt VariableSetStmt VariableShowStmt\n\t\tViewStmt CheckPointStmt CreateConversionStmt\n\t\tDeallocateStmt AlterPublicationStmt\n\t\tCreateSubscriptionStmt AlterSubscriptionStmt DropSubscriptionStmt\n\n%type <node>\tselect_no_parens select_with_parens select_clause\n\t\t\t\tsimple_select values_clause\n\t\t\t\tPLpgSQL_Expr PLAssignStmt\n\n%type <str>\t\t\topt_single_name\n%type <list>\t\topt_qualified_name\n%type <boolean>\t\topt_concurrently\n%type <list>\tparse_toplevel stmtmulti routine_body_stmt_list\n\t\t\t\tOptTableElementList TableElementList OptInherit definition\n\t\t\t\tOptTypedTableElementList TypedTableElementList\n\t\t\t\treloptions opt_reloptions\n\t\t\t\tOptWith opt_definition func_args func_args_list\n\t\t\t\tfunc_args_with_defaults func_args_with_defaults_list\n\t\t\t\taggr_args aggr_args_list\n\t\t\t\tfunc_as from_list opt_array_bounds\n\t\t\t\tqualified_name_list any_name any_name_list type_name_list\n\t\t\t\tany_operator expr_list attrs\n\t\t\t\tdistinct_clause opt_distinct_clause\n\t\t\t\ttarget_list opt_target_list insert_column_list set_target_list\n\t\t\t\tmerge_values_clause\n\t\t\t\tset_clause_list set_clause\n\t\t\t\tdef_list operator_def_list indirection TriggerReferencing\n\t\t\t\tvacuum_relation_list opt_vacuum_relation_list\n\t\t\t\tdrop_option_list pub_obj_list\n\n%type <retclause> returning_clause\n%type <node>\treturning_option\n%type <retoptionkind> returning_option_kind\n%type <node>\topt_routine_body\n%type <groupclause> group_clause\n%type <list>\tgroup_by_list\n%type <node>\tgroup_by_item empty_grouping_set rollup_clause opt_merge_when_condition\n%type <list>\tmerge_when_list\n\n%type <vsetstmt> generic_set set_rest set_rest_more generic_reset reset_rest\n\t\t\t\t SetResetClause FunctionSetResetClause\n\n%type old_aggr_elem operator_def_elem\n%type <node>\tdef_arg columnElem where_clause where_or_current_clause\n\t\t\t\ta_expr b_expr c_expr AexprConst indirection_el opt_slice_bound\n\t\t\t\tcolumnref having_clause func_table xmltable array_expr\n\t\t\t\tOptWhereClause operator_def_arg\n%type <list>\topt_column_and_period_list\n%type <list>\trowsfrom_item rowsfrom_list opt_col_def_list\n%type <node>\tfunc_application func_expr_common_subexpr\n%type <node>\tfunc_expr func_expr_windowless\n%type <node>\tcommon_table_expr\n%type <with>\twith_clause opt_with_clause\n%type <list>\tcte_list\n\n%type <list>\twithin_group_clause\n%type <node>\tfilter_clause\n%type <list>\twindow_clause window_definition_list opt_partition_clause\n%type <windef>\twindow_definition over_clause window_specification\n\t\t\t\topt_frame_clause frame_extent frame_bound\n%type <ival>\topt_window_exclusion_clause\n%type <str>\t\topt_existing_window_name\n%type <boolean> opt_if_not_exists\n%type <boolean> opt_unique_null_treatment\n%type <ival>\tgenerated_when override_kind opt_virtual_or_stored\n%type <partspec>\tPartitionSpec OptPartitionSpec\n%type <partelem>\tpart_elem\n%type <list>\t\tpart_params\n%type <partboundspec> PartitionBoundSpec\n%type <list>\t\thash_partbound\n%type <defelt>\t\thash_partbound_elem\n\n%type <node>\tjson_format_clause\n\t\t\t\tjson_format_clause_opt\n\t\t\t\tjson_value_expr\n\t\t\t\tjson_returning_clause_opt\n\t\t\t\tjson_name_and_value\n\t\t\t\tjson_aggregate_func\n\t\t\t\tjson_argument\n\t\t\t\tjson_behavior\n\t\t\t\tjson_on_error_clause_opt\n\t\t\t\tjson_table\n\t\t\t\tjson_table_column_definition\n\t\t\t\tjson_table_column_path_clause_opt\n%type <list>\tjson_name_and_value_list\n\t\t\t\tjson_value_expr_list\n\t\t\t\tjson_array_aggregate_order_by_clause_opt\n\t\t\t\tjson_arguments\n\t\t\t\tjson_behavior_clause_opt\n\t\t\t\tjson_passing_clause_opt\n\t\t\t\tjson_table_column_definition_list\n%type <str>\t\tjson_table_path_name_opt\n%type <ival>\tjson_behavior_type\n\t\t\t\tjson_predicate_type_constraint\n\t\t\t\tjson_quotes_clause_opt\n\t\t\t\tjson_wrapper_behavior\n%type <boolean>\tjson_key_uniqueness_constraint_opt\n\t\t\t\tjson_object_constructor_null_clause_opt\n\t\t\t\tjson_array_constructor_null_clause_opt\n\n\n/*\n * Non-keyword token types.  These are hard-wired into the \"flex\" lexer.\n * They must be listed first so that their numeric codes do not depend on\n * the set of keywords.  PL/pgSQL depends on this so that it can share the\n * same lexer.  If you add/change tokens here, fix PL/pgSQL to match!\n *\n * UIDENT and USCONST are reduced to IDENT and SCONST in parser.c, so that\n * they need no productions here; but we must assign token codes to them.\n *\n * DOT_DOT is unused in the core SQL grammar, and so will always provoke\n * parse errors.  It is needed by PL/pgSQL.\n */\n%token <str>\tIDENT UIDENT FCONST SCONST USCONST BCONST XCONST Op\n%token <ival>\tICONST PARAM\n%token\t\t\tTYPECAST DOT_DOT COLON_EQUALS EQUALS_GREATER\n%token\t\t\tLESS_EQUALS GREATER_EQUALS NOT_EQUALS\n\n/*\n * If you want to make any keyword changes, update the keyword table in\n * src/include/parser/kwlist.h and add new keywords to the appropriate one\n * of the reserved-or-not-so-reserved keyword lists, below; search\n * this file for \"Keyword category lists\".\n */\n\n/* ordinary key words in alphabetical order */\n%token <keyword> ABORT_P ABSENT ABSOLUTE_P ACCESS ACTION ADD_P ADMIN AFTER\n\tAGGREGATE ALL ALSO ALTER ALWAYS ANALYSE ANALYZE AND ANY ARRAY AS ASC\n\tASENSITIVE ASSERTION ASSIGNMENT ASYMMETRIC ATOMIC AT ATTACH ATTRIBUTE AUTHORIZATION\n\n\tBACKWARD BEFORE BEGIN_P BETWEEN BIGINT BINARY BIT\n\tBOOLEAN_P BOTH BREADTH BY\n\n\tCACHE CALL CALLED CASCADE CASCADED CASE CAST CATALOG_P CHAIN CHAR_P\n\tCHARACTER CHARACTERISTICS CHECK CHECKPOINT CLASS CLOSE\n\tCLUSTER COALESCE COLLATE COLLATION COLUMN COLUMNS COMMENT COMMENTS COMMIT\n\tCOMMITTED COMPRESSION CONCURRENTLY CONDITIONAL CONFIGURATION CONFLICT\n\tCONNECTION CONSTRAINT CONSTRAINTS CONTENT_P CONTINUE_P CONVERSION_P COPY\n\tCOST CREATE CROSS CSV CUBE CURRENT_P\n\tCURRENT_CATALOG CURRENT_DATE CURRENT_ROLE CURRENT_SCHEMA\n\tCURRENT_TIME CURRENT_TIMESTAMP CURRENT_USER CURSOR CYCLE\n\n\tDATA_P DATABASE DAY_P DEALLOCATE DEC DECIMAL_P DECLARE DEFAULT DEFAULTS\n\tDEFERRABLE DEFERRED DEFINER DELETE_P DELIMITER DELIMITERS DEPENDS DEPTH DESC\n\tDETACH DICTIONARY DISABLE_P DISCARD DISTINCT DO DOCUMENT_P DOMAIN_P\n\tDOUBLE_P DROP\n\n\tEACH ELSE EMPTY_P ENABLE_P ENCODING ENCRYPTED END_P ENFORCED ENUM_P ERROR_P\n\tESCAPE EVENT EXCEPT EXCLUDE EXCLUDING EXCLUSIVE EXECUTE EXISTS EXPLAIN\n\tEXPRESSION EXTENSION EXTERNAL EXTRACT\n\n\tFALSE_P FAMILY FETCH FILTER FINALIZE FIRST_P FLOAT_P FOLLOWING FOR\n\tFORCE FOREIGN FORMAT FORWARD FREEZE FROM FULL FUNCTION FUNCTIONS\n\n\tGENERATED GLOBAL GRANT GRANTED GREATEST GROUP_P GROUPING GROUPS\n\n\tHANDLER HAVING HEADER_P HOLD HOUR_P\n\n\tIDENTITY_P IF_P ILIKE IMMEDIATE IMMUTABLE IMPLICIT_P IMPORT_P IN_P INCLUDE\n\tINCLUDING INCREMENT INDENT INDEX INDEXES INHERIT INHERITS INITIALLY INLINE_P\n\tINNER_P INOUT INPUT_P INSENSITIVE INSERT INSTEAD INT_P INTEGER\n\tINTERSECT INTERVAL INTO INVOKER IS ISNULL ISOLATION\n\n\tJOIN JSON JSON_ARRAY JSON_ARRAYAGG JSON_EXISTS JSON_OBJECT JSON_OBJECTAGG\n\tJSON_QUERY JSON_SCALAR JSON_SERIALIZE JSON_TABLE JSON_VALUE\n\n\tKEEP KEY KEYS\n\n\tLABEL LANGUAGE LARGE_P LAST_P LATERAL_P\n\tLEADING LEAKPROOF LEAST LEFT LEVEL LIKE LIMIT LISTEN LOAD LOCAL\n\tLOCALTIME LOCALTIMESTAMP LOCATION LOCK_P LOCKED LOGGED\n\n\tMAPPING MATCH MATCHED MATERIALIZED MAXVALUE MERGE MERGE_ACTION METHOD\n\tMINUTE_P MINVALUE MODE MONTH_P MOVE\n\n\tNAME_P NAMES NATIONAL NATURAL NCHAR NESTED NEW NEXT NFC NFD NFKC NFKD NO\n\tNONE NORMALIZE NORMALIZED\n\tNOT NOTHING NOTIFY NOTNULL NOWAIT NULL_P NULLIF\n\tNULLS_P NUMERIC\n\n\tOBJECT_P OBJECTS_P OF OFF OFFSET OIDS OLD OMIT ON ONLY OPERATOR OPTION OPTIONS OR\n\tORDER ORDINALITY OTHERS OUT_P OUTER_P\n\tOVER OVERLAPS OVERLAY OVERRIDING OWNED OWNER\n\n\tPARALLEL PARAMETER PARSER PARTIAL PARTITION PASSING PASSWORD PATH\n\tPERIOD PLACING PLAN PLANS POLICY\n\tPOSITION PRECEDING PRECISION PRESERVE PREPARE PREPARED PRIMARY\n\tPRIOR PRIVILEGES PROCEDURAL PROCEDURE PROCEDURES PROGRAM PUBLICATION\n\n\tQUOTE QUOTES\n\n\tRANGE READ REAL REASSIGN RECURSIVE REF_P REFERENCES REFERENCING\n\tREFRESH REINDEX RELATIVE_P RELEASE RENAME REPEATABLE REPLACE REPLICA\n\tRESET RESTART RESTRICT RETURN RETURNING RETURNS REVOKE RIGHT ROLE ROLLBACK ROLLUP\n\tROUTINE ROUTINES ROW ROWS RULE\n\n\tSAVEPOINT SCALAR SCHEMA SCHEMAS SCROLL SEARCH SECOND_P SECURITY SELECT\n\tSEQUENCE SEQUENCES\n\tSERIALIZABLE SERVER SESSION SESSION_USER SET SETS SETOF SHARE SHOW\n\tSIMILAR SIMPLE SKIP SMALLINT SNAPSHOT SOME SOURCE SQL_P STABLE STANDALONE_P\n\tSTART STATEMENT STATISTICS STDIN STDOUT STORAGE STORED STRICT_P STRING_P STRIP_P\n\tSUBSCRIPTION SUBSTRING SUPPORT SYMMETRIC SYSID SYSTEM_P SYSTEM_USER\n\n\tTABLE TABLES TABLESAMPLE TABLESPACE TARGET TEMP TEMPLATE TEMPORARY TEXT_P THEN\n\tTIES TIME TIMESTAMP TO TRAILING TRANSACTION TRANSFORM\n\tTREAT TRIGGER TRIM TRUE_P\n\tTRUNCATE TRUSTED TYPE_P TYPES_P\n\n\tUESCAPE UNBOUNDED UNCONDITIONAL UNCOMMITTED UNENCRYPTED UNION UNIQUE UNKNOWN\n\tUNLISTEN UNLOGGED UNTIL UPDATE USER USING\n\n\tVACUUM VALID VALIDATE VALIDATOR VALUE_P VALUES VARCHAR VARIADIC VARYING\n\tVERBOSE VERSION_P VIEW VIEWS VIRTUAL VOLATILE\n\n\tWHEN WHERE WHITESPACE_P WINDOW WITH WITHIN WITHOUT WORK WRAPPER WRITE\n\n\tXML_P XMLATTRIBUTES XMLCONCAT XMLELEMENT XMLEXISTS XMLFOREST XMLNAMESPACES\n\tXMLPARSE XMLPI XMLROOT XMLSERIALIZE XMLTABLE\n\n\tYEAR_P YES_P\n\n\tZONE\n\n/*\n * The grammar thinks these are keywords, but they are not in the kwlist.h\n * list and so can never be entered directly.  The filter in parser.c\n * creates these tokens when required (based on looking one token ahead).\n *\n * NOT_LA exists so that productions such as NOT LIKE can be given the same\n * precedence as LIKE; otherwise they'd effectively have the same precedence\n * as NOT, at least with respect to their left-hand subexpression.\n * FORMAT_LA, NULLS_LA, WITH_LA, and WITHOUT_LA are needed to make the grammar\n * LALR(1).\n */\n%token\t\tFORMAT_LA NOT_LA NULLS_LA WITH_LA WITHOUT_LA\n\n/*\n * The grammar likewise thinks these tokens are keywords, but they are never\n * generated by the scanner.  Rather, they can be injected by parser.c as\n * the initial token of the string (using the lookahead-token mechanism\n * implemented there).  This provides a way to tell the grammar to parse\n * something other than the usual list of SQL commands.\n */\n%token\t\tMODE_TYPE_NAME\n%token\t\tMODE_PLPGSQL_EXPR\n%token\t\tMODE_PLPGSQL_ASSIGN1\n%token\t\tMODE_PLPGSQL_ASSIGN2\n%token\t\tMODE_PLPGSQL_ASSIGN3\n\n\n/* Precedence: lowest to highest */\n%left\t\tUNION EXCEPT\n%left\t\tINTERSECT\n%left\t\tOR\n%left\t\tAND\n%right\t\tNOT\n%nonassoc\tIS ISNULL NOTNULL\t/* IS sets precedence for IS NULL, etc */\n%nonassoc\t'<' '>' '=' LESS_EQUALS GREATER_EQUALS NOT_EQUALS\n%nonassoc\tBETWEEN IN_P LIKE ILIKE SIMILAR NOT_LA\n%nonassoc\tESCAPE\t\t\t/* ESCAPE must be just above LIKE/ILIKE/SIMILAR */\n\n/*\n * Sometimes it is necessary to assign precedence to keywords that are not\n * really part of the operator hierarchy, in order to resolve grammar\n * ambiguities.  It's best to avoid doing so whenever possible, because such\n * assignments have global effect and may hide ambiguities besides the one\n * you intended to solve.  (Attaching a precedence to a single rule with\n * %prec is far safer and should be preferred.)  If you must give precedence\n * to a new keyword, try very hard to give it the same precedence as IDENT.\n * If the keyword has IDENT's precedence then it clearly acts the same as\n * non-keywords and other similar keywords, thus reducing the risk of\n * unexpected precedence effects.\n *\n * We used to need to assign IDENT an explicit precedence just less than Op,\n * to support target_el without AS.  While that's not really necessary since\n * we removed postfix operators, we continue to do so because it provides a\n * reference point for a precedence level that we can assign to other\n * keywords that lack a natural precedence level.\n *\n * We need to do this for PARTITION, RANGE, ROWS, and GROUPS to support\n * opt_existing_window_name (see comment there).\n *\n * The frame_bound productions UNBOUNDED PRECEDING and UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING\n * are even messier: since UNBOUNDED is an unreserved keyword (per spec!),\n * there is no principled way to distinguish these from the productions\n * a_expr PRECEDING/FOLLOWING.  We hack this up by giving UNBOUNDED slightly\n * lower precedence than PRECEDING and FOLLOWING.  At present this doesn't\n * appear to cause UNBOUNDED to be treated differently from other unreserved\n * keywords anywhere else in the grammar, but it's definitely risky.  We can\n * blame any funny behavior of UNBOUNDED on the SQL standard, though.\n *\n * To support CUBE and ROLLUP in GROUP BY without reserving them, we give them\n * an explicit priority lower than '(', so that a rule with CUBE '(' will shift\n * rather than reducing a conflicting rule that takes CUBE as a function name.\n * Using the same precedence as IDENT seems right for the reasons given above.\n *\n * SET is likewise assigned the same precedence as IDENT, to support the\n * relation_expr_opt_alias production (see comment there).\n *\n * KEYS, OBJECT_P, SCALAR, VALUE_P, WITH, and WITHOUT are similarly assigned\n * the same precedence as IDENT.  This allows resolving conflicts in the\n * json_predicate_type_constraint and json_key_uniqueness_constraint_opt\n * productions (see comments there).\n *\n * Like the UNBOUNDED PRECEDING/FOLLOWING case, NESTED is assigned a lower\n * precedence than PATH to fix ambiguity in the json_table production.\n */\n%nonassoc\tUNBOUNDED NESTED /* ideally would have same precedence as IDENT */\n%nonassoc\tIDENT PARTITION RANGE ROWS GROUPS PRECEDING FOLLOWING CUBE ROLLUP\n\t\t\tSET KEYS OBJECT_P SCALAR VALUE_P WITH WITHOUT PATH\n%left\t\tOp OPERATOR\t\t/* multi-character ops and user-defined operators */\n%left\t\t'+' '-'\n%left\t\t'*' '/' '%'\n%left\t\t'^'\n/* Unary Operators */\n%left\t\tAT\t\t\t\t/* sets precedence for AT TIME ZONE, AT LOCAL */\n%left\t\tCOLLATE\n%right\t\tUMINUS\n%left\t\t'[' ']'\n%left\t\t'(' ')'\n%left\t\tTYPECAST\n%left\t\t'.'\n/*\n * These might seem to be low-precedence, but actually they are not part\n * of the arithmetic hierarchy at all in their use as JOIN operators.\n * We make them high-precedence to support their use as function names.\n * They wouldn't be given a precedence at all, were it not that we need\n * left-associativity among the JOIN rules themselves.\n */\n%left\t\tJOIN CROSS LEFT FULL RIGHT INNER_P NATURAL\n\n%%\n\n/*\n *\tThe target production for the whole parse.\n *\n * Ordinarily we parse a list of statements, but if we see one of the\n * special MODE_XXX symbols as first token, we parse something else.\n * The options here correspond to enum RawParseMode, which see for details.\n */\nparse_toplevel:\n\t\t\tstmtmulti\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tpg_yyget_extra(yyscanner)->parsetree = $1;\n\t\t\t\t(void) yynerrs;\t\t/* suppress compiler warning */\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| MODE_TYPE_NAME Typename\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tpg_yyget_extra(yyscanner)->parsetree = list_make1($2);\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| MODE_PLPGSQL_EXPR PLpgSQL_Expr\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tpg_yyget_extra(yyscanner)->parsetree =\n\t\t\t\t\tlist_make1(makeRawStmt($2, @2));\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| MODE_PLPGSQL_ASSIGN1 PLAssignStmt\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tPLAssignStmt *n = (PLAssignStmt *) $2;\n\n\t\t\t\tn->nnames = 1;\n\t\t\t\tpg_yyget_extra(yyscanner)->parsetree =\n\t\t\t\t\tlist_make1(makeRawStmt((Node *) n, @2));\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| MODE_PLPGSQL_ASSIGN2 PLAssignStmt\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tPLAssignStmt *n = (PLAssignStmt *) $2;\n\n\t\t\t\tn->nnames = 2;\n\t\t\t\tpg_yyget_extra(yyscanner)->parsetree =\n\t\t\t\t\tlist_make1(makeRawStmt((Node *) n, @2));\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| MODE_PLPGSQL_ASSIGN3 PLAssignStmt\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tPLAssignStmt *n = (PLAssignStmt *) $2;\n\n\t\t\t\tn->nnames = 3;\n\t\t\t\tpg_yyget_extra(yyscanner)->parsetree =\n\t\t\t\t\tlist_make1(makeRawStmt((Node *) n, @2));\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n/*\n * At top level, we wrap each stmt with a RawStmt node carrying start location\n * and length of the stmt's text.\n * We also take care to discard empty statements entirely (which among other\n * things dodges the problem of assigning them a location).\n */\nstmtmulti:\tstmtmulti ';' toplevel_stmt\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tif ($1 != NIL)\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t/* update length of previous stmt */\n\t\t\t\t\t\tupdateRawStmtEnd(llast_node(RawStmt, $1), @2);\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\tif ($3 != NULL)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t$$ = lappend($1, makeRawStmt($3, @3));\n\t\t\t\t\telse\n\t\t\t\t\t\t$$ = $1;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| toplevel_stmt\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tif ($1 != NULL)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t$$ = list_make1(makeRawStmt($1, @1));\n\t\t\t\t\telse\n\t\t\t\t\t\t$$ = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n/*\n * toplevel_stmt includes BEGIN and END.  stmt does not include them, because\n * those words have different meanings in function bodies.\n */\ntoplevel_stmt:\n\t\t\tstmt\n\t\t\t| TransactionStmtLegacy\n\t\t;\n\nstmt:\n\t\t\tAlterEventTrigStmt\n\t\t\t| AlterCollationStmt\n\t\t\t| AlterDatabaseStmt\n\t\t\t| AlterDatabaseSetStmt\n\t\t\t| AlterDefaultPrivilegesStmt\n\t\t\t| AlterDomainStmt\n\t\t\t| AlterEnumStmt\n\t\t\t| AlterExtensionStmt\n\t\t\t| AlterExtensionContentsStmt\n\t\t\t| AlterFdwStmt\n\t\t\t| AlterForeignServerStmt\n\t\t\t| AlterFunctionStmt\n\t\t\t| AlterGroupStmt\n\t\t\t| AlterObjectDependsStmt\n\t\t\t| AlterObjectSchemaStmt\n\t\t\t| AlterOwnerStmt\n\t\t\t| AlterOperatorStmt\n\t\t\t| AlterTypeStmt\n\t\t\t| AlterPolicyStmt\n\t\t\t| AlterSeqStmt\n\t\t\t| AlterSystemStmt\n\t\t\t| AlterTableStmt\n\t\t\t| AlterTblSpcStmt\n\t\t\t| AlterCompositeTypeStmt\n\t\t\t| AlterPublicationStmt\n\t\t\t| AlterRoleSetStmt\n\t\t\t| AlterRoleStmt\n\t\t\t| AlterSubscriptionStmt\n\t\t\t| AlterStatsStmt\n\t\t\t| AlterTSConfigurationStmt\n\t\t\t| AlterTSDictionaryStmt\n\t\t\t| AlterUserMappingStmt\n\t\t\t| AnalyzeStmt\n\t\t\t| CallStmt\n\t\t\t| CheckPointStmt\n\t\t\t| ClosePortalStmt\n\t\t\t| ClusterStmt\n\t\t\t| CommentStmt\n\t\t\t| ConstraintsSetStmt\n\t\t\t| CopyStmt\n\t\t\t| CreateAmStmt\n\t\t\t| CreateAsStmt\n\t\t\t| CreateAssertionStmt\n\t\t\t| CreateCastStmt\n\t\t\t| CreateConversionStmt\n\t\t\t| CreateDomainStmt\n\t\t\t| CreateExtensionStmt\n\t\t\t| CreateFdwStmt\n\t\t\t| CreateForeignServerStmt\n\t\t\t| CreateForeignTableStmt\n\t\t\t| CreateFunctionStmt\n\t\t\t| CreateGroupStmt\n\t\t\t| CreateMatViewStmt\n\t\t\t| CreateOpClassStmt\n\t\t\t| CreateOpFamilyStmt\n\t\t\t| CreatePublicationStmt\n\t\t\t| AlterOpFamilyStmt\n\t\t\t| CreatePolicyStmt\n\t\t\t| CreatePLangStmt\n\t\t\t| CreateSchemaStmt\n\t\t\t| CreateSeqStmt\n\t\t\t| CreateStmt\n\t\t\t| CreateSubscriptionStmt\n\t\t\t| CreateStatsStmt\n\t\t\t| CreateTableSpaceStmt\n\t\t\t| CreateTransformStmt\n\t\t\t| CreateTrigStmt\n\t\t\t| CreateEventTrigStmt\n\t\t\t| CreateRoleStmt\n\t\t\t| CreateUserStmt\n\t\t\t| CreateUserMappingStmt\n\t\t\t| CreatedbStmt\n\t\t\t| DeallocateStmt\n\t\t\t| DeclareCursorStmt\n\t\t\t| DefineStmt\n\t\t\t| DeleteStmt\n\t\t\t| DiscardStmt\n\t\t\t| DoStmt\n\t\t\t| DropCastStmt\n\t\t\t| DropOpClassStmt\n\t\t\t| DropOpFamilyStmt\n\t\t\t| DropOwnedStmt\n\t\t\t| DropStmt\n\t\t\t| DropSubscriptionStmt\n\t\t\t| DropTableSpaceStmt\n\t\t\t| DropTransformStmt\n\t\t\t| DropRoleStmt\n\t\t\t| DropUserMappingStmt\n\t\t\t| DropdbStmt\n\t\t\t| ExecuteStmt\n\t\t\t| ExplainStmt\n\t\t\t| FetchStmt\n\t\t\t| GrantStmt\n\t\t\t| GrantRoleStmt\n\t\t\t| ImportForeignSchemaStmt\n\t\t\t| IndexStmt\n\t\t\t| InsertStmt\n\t\t\t| ListenStmt\n\t\t\t| RefreshMatViewStmt\n\t\t\t| LoadStmt\n\t\t\t| LockStmt\n\t\t\t| MergeStmt\n\t\t\t| NotifyStmt\n\t\t\t| PrepareStmt\n\t\t\t| ReassignOwnedStmt\n\t\t\t| ReindexStmt\n\t\t\t| RemoveAggrStmt\n\t\t\t| RemoveFuncStmt\n\t\t\t| RemoveOperStmt\n\t\t\t| RenameStmt\n\t\t\t| RevokeStmt\n\t\t\t| RevokeRoleStmt\n\t\t\t| RuleStmt\n\t\t\t| SecLabelStmt\n\t\t\t| SelectStmt\n\t\t\t| TransactionStmt\n\t\t\t| TruncateStmt\n\t\t\t| UnlistenStmt\n\t\t\t| UpdateStmt\n\t\t\t| VacuumStmt\n\t\t\t| VariableResetStmt\n\t\t\t| VariableSetStmt\n\t\t\t| VariableShowStmt\n\t\t\t| ViewStmt\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\n\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NULL; }\n\t\t;\n\n/*\n * Generic supporting productions for DDL\n */\nopt_single_name:\n\t\t\tColId\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $1; }\n\t\t\t| /* EMPTY */\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NULL; }\n\t\t;\n\nopt_qualified_name:\n\t\t\tany_name\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $1; }\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NIL; }\n\t\t;\n\nopt_concurrently:\n\t\t\tCONCURRENTLY\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = true; }\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = false; }\n\t\t;\n\nopt_drop_behavior:\n\t\t\tCASCADE\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = DROP_CASCADE; }\n\t\t\t| RESTRICT\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = DROP_RESTRICT; }\n\t\t\t| /* EMPTY */\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = DROP_RESTRICT; /* default */ }\n\t\t;\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n * CALL statement\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nCallStmt:\tCALL func_application\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCallStmt   *n = makeNode(CallStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->funccall = castNode(FuncCall, $2);\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n * Create a new Postgres DBMS role\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nCreateRoleStmt:\n\t\t\tCREATE ROLE RoleId opt_with OptRoleList\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateRoleStmt *n = makeNode(CreateRoleStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->stmt_type = ROLESTMT_ROLE;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->role = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n\nopt_with:\tWITH\n\t\t\t| WITH_LA\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\n\t\t;\n\n/*\n * Options for CREATE ROLE and ALTER ROLE (also used by CREATE/ALTER USER\n * for backwards compatibility).  Note: the only option required by SQL99\n * is \"WITH ADMIN name\".\n */\nOptRoleList:\n\t\t\tOptRoleList CreateOptRoleElem\t\t\t{ $$ = lappend($1, $2); }\n\t\t\t| /* EMPTY */\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NIL; }\n\t\t;\n\nAlterOptRoleList:\n\t\t\tAlterOptRoleList AlterOptRoleElem\t\t{ $$ = lappend($1, $2); }\n\t\t\t| /* EMPTY */\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NIL; }\n\t\t;\n\nAlterOptRoleElem:\n\t\t\tPASSWORD Sconst\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"password\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t (Node *) makeString($2), @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| PASSWORD NULL_P\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"password\", NULL, @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ENCRYPTED PASSWORD Sconst\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t/*\n\t\t\t\t\t * These days, passwords are always stored in encrypted\n\t\t\t\t\t * form, so there is no difference between PASSWORD and\n\t\t\t\t\t * ENCRYPTED PASSWORD.\n\t\t\t\t\t */\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"password\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t (Node *) makeString($3), @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| UNENCRYPTED PASSWORD Sconst\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"UNENCRYPTED PASSWORD is no longer supported\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t errhint(\"Remove UNENCRYPTED to store the password in encrypted form instead.\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(@1)));\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| INHERIT\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"inherit\", (Node *) makeBoolean(true), @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| CONNECTION LIMIT SignedIconst\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"connectionlimit\", (Node *) makeInteger($3), @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| VALID UNTIL Sconst\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"validUntil\", (Node *) makeString($3), @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t/*\tSupported but not documented for roles, for use by ALTER GROUP. */\n\t\t\t| USER role_list\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"rolemembers\", (Node *) $2, @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| IDENT\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t/*\n\t\t\t\t\t * We handle identifiers that aren't parser keywords with\n\t\t\t\t\t * the following special-case codes, to avoid bloating the\n\t\t\t\t\t * size of the main parser.\n\t\t\t\t\t */\n\t\t\t\t\tif (strcmp($1, \"superuser\") == 0)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"superuser\", (Node *) makeBoolean(true), @1);\n\t\t\t\t\telse if (strcmp($1, \"nosuperuser\") == 0)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"superuser\", (Node *) makeBoolean(false), @1);\n\t\t\t\t\telse if (strcmp($1, \"createrole\") == 0)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"createrole\", (Node *) makeBoolean(true), @1);\n\t\t\t\t\telse if (strcmp($1, \"nocreaterole\") == 0)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"createrole\", (Node *) makeBoolean(false), @1);\n\t\t\t\t\telse if (strcmp($1, \"replication\") == 0)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"isreplication\", (Node *) makeBoolean(true), @1);\n\t\t\t\t\telse if (strcmp($1, \"noreplication\") == 0)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"isreplication\", (Node *) makeBoolean(false), @1);\n\t\t\t\t\telse if (strcmp($1, \"createdb\") == 0)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"createdb\", (Node *) makeBoolean(true), @1);\n\t\t\t\t\telse if (strcmp($1, \"nocreatedb\") == 0)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"createdb\", (Node *) makeBoolean(false), @1);\n\t\t\t\t\telse if (strcmp($1, \"login\") == 0)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"canlogin\", (Node *) makeBoolean(true), @1);\n\t\t\t\t\telse if (strcmp($1, \"nologin\") == 0)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"canlogin\", (Node *) makeBoolean(false), @1);\n\t\t\t\t\telse if (strcmp($1, \"bypassrls\") == 0)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"bypassrls\", (Node *) makeBoolean(true), @1);\n\t\t\t\t\telse if (strcmp($1, \"nobypassrls\") == 0)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"bypassrls\", (Node *) makeBoolean(false), @1);\n\t\t\t\t\telse if (strcmp($1, \"noinherit\") == 0)\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t/*\n\t\t\t\t\t\t * Note that INHERIT is a keyword, so it's handled by main parser, but\n\t\t\t\t\t\t * NOINHERIT is handled here.\n\t\t\t\t\t\t */\n\t\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"inherit\", (Node *) makeBoolean(false), @1);\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\telse\n\t\t\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"unrecognized role option \\\"%s\\\"\", $1),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(@1)));\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nCreateOptRoleElem:\n\t\t\tAlterOptRoleElem\t\t\t{ $$ = $1; }\n\t\t\t/* The following are not supported by ALTER ROLE/USER/GROUP */\n\t\t\t| SYSID Iconst\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"sysid\", (Node *) makeInteger($2), @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ADMIN role_list\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"adminmembers\", (Node *) $2, @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ROLE role_list\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"rolemembers\", (Node *) $2, @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| IN_P ROLE role_list\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"addroleto\", (Node *) $3, @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| IN_P GROUP_P role_list\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"addroleto\", (Node *) $3, @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n * Create a new Postgres DBMS user (role with implied login ability)\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nCreateUserStmt:\n\t\t\tCREATE USER RoleId opt_with OptRoleList\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateRoleStmt *n = makeNode(CreateRoleStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->stmt_type = ROLESTMT_USER;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->role = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n * Alter a postgresql DBMS role\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nAlterRoleStmt:\n\t\t\tALTER ROLE RoleSpec opt_with AlterOptRoleList\n\t\t\t\t {\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterRoleStmt *n = makeNode(AlterRoleStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->role = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->action = +1;\t/* add, if there are members */\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t }\n\t\t\t| ALTER USER RoleSpec opt_with AlterOptRoleList\n\t\t\t\t {\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterRoleStmt *n = makeNode(AlterRoleStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->role = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->action = +1;\t/* add, if there are members */\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t }\n\t\t;\n\nopt_in_database:\n\t\t\t   /* EMPTY */\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NULL; }\n\t\t\t| IN_P DATABASE name\t{ $$ = $3; }\n\t\t;\n\nAlterRoleSetStmt:\n\t\t\tALTER ROLE RoleSpec opt_in_database SetResetClause\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterRoleSetStmt *n = makeNode(AlterRoleSetStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->role = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->database = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->setstmt = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ALTER ROLE ALL opt_in_database SetResetClause\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterRoleSetStmt *n = makeNode(AlterRoleSetStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->role = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->database = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->setstmt = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ALTER USER RoleSpec opt_in_database SetResetClause\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterRoleSetStmt *n = makeNode(AlterRoleSetStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->role = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->database = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->setstmt = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ALTER USER ALL opt_in_database SetResetClause\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterRoleSetStmt *n = makeNode(AlterRoleSetStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->role = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->database = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->setstmt = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n * Drop a postgresql DBMS role\n *\n * XXX Ideally this would have CASCADE/RESTRICT options, but a role\n * might own objects in multiple databases, and there is presently no way to\n * implement cascading to other databases.  So we always behave as RESTRICT.\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nDropRoleStmt:\n\t\t\tDROP ROLE role_list\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDropRoleStmt *n = makeNode(DropRoleStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->roles = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| DROP ROLE IF_P EXISTS role_list\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDropRoleStmt *n = makeNode(DropRoleStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = true;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->roles = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| DROP USER role_list\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDropRoleStmt *n = makeNode(DropRoleStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->roles = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| DROP USER IF_P EXISTS role_list\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDropRoleStmt *n = makeNode(DropRoleStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->roles = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = true;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| DROP GROUP_P role_list\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDropRoleStmt *n = makeNode(DropRoleStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->roles = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| DROP GROUP_P IF_P EXISTS role_list\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDropRoleStmt *n = makeNode(DropRoleStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = true;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->roles = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t;\n\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n * Create a postgresql group (role without login ability)\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nCreateGroupStmt:\n\t\t\tCREATE GROUP_P RoleId opt_with OptRoleList\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateRoleStmt *n = makeNode(CreateRoleStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->stmt_type = ROLESTMT_GROUP;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->role = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n * Alter a postgresql group\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nAlterGroupStmt:\n\t\t\tALTER GROUP_P RoleSpec add_drop USER role_list\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterRoleStmt *n = makeNode(AlterRoleStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->role = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->action = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = list_make1(makeDefElem(\"rolemembers\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(Node *) $6, @6));\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nadd_drop:\tADD_P\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = +1; }\n\t\t\t| DROP\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = -1; }\n\t\t;\n\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n * Manipulate a schema\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nCreateSchemaStmt:\n\t\t\tCREATE SCHEMA opt_single_name AUTHORIZATION RoleSpec OptSchemaEltList\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateSchemaStmt *n = makeNode(CreateSchemaStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\t/* One can omit the schema name or the authorization id. */\n\t\t\t\t\tn->schemaname = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->authrole = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->schemaElts = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->if_not_exists = false;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| CREATE SCHEMA ColId OptSchemaEltList\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateSchemaStmt *n = makeNode(CreateSchemaStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\t/* ...but not both */\n\t\t\t\t\tn->schemaname = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->authrole = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->schemaElts = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->if_not_exists = false;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| CREATE SCHEMA IF_P NOT EXISTS opt_single_name AUTHORIZATION RoleSpec OptSchemaEltList\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateSchemaStmt *n = makeNode(CreateSchemaStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\t/* schema name can be omitted here, too */\n\t\t\t\t\tn->schemaname = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->authrole = $8;\n\t\t\t\t\tif ($9 != NIL)\n\t\t\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS cannot include schema elements\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(@9)));\n\t\t\t\t\tn->schemaElts = $9;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->if_not_exists = true;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| CREATE SCHEMA IF_P NOT EXISTS ColId OptSchemaEltList\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateSchemaStmt *n = makeNode(CreateSchemaStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\t/* ...but not here */\n\t\t\t\t\tn->schemaname = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->authrole = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tif ($7 != NIL)\n\t\t\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS cannot include schema elements\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(@7)));\n\t\t\t\t\tn->schemaElts = $7;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->if_not_exists = true;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nOptSchemaEltList:\n\t\t\tOptSchemaEltList schema_stmt\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = lappend($1, $2);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| /* EMPTY */\n\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NIL; }\n\t\t;\n\n/*\n *\tschema_stmt are the ones that can show up inside a CREATE SCHEMA\n *\tstatement (in addition to by themselves).\n */\nschema_stmt:\n\t\t\tCreateStmt\n\t\t\t| IndexStmt\n\t\t\t| CreateSeqStmt\n\t\t\t| CreateTrigStmt\n\t\t\t| GrantStmt\n\t\t\t| ViewStmt\n\t\t;\n\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n * Set PG internal variable\n *\t  SET name TO 'var_value'\n * Include SQL syntax (thomas 1997-10-22):\n *\t  SET TIME ZONE 'var_value'\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nVariableSetStmt:\n\t\t\tSET set_rest\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariableSetStmt *n = $2;\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->is_local = false;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| SET LOCAL set_rest\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariableSetStmt *n = $3;\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->is_local = true;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| SET SESSION set_rest\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariableSetStmt *n = $3;\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->is_local = false;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nset_rest:\n\t\t\tTRANSACTION transaction_mode_list\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariableSetStmt *n = makeNode(VariableSetStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = VAR_SET_MULTI;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = \"TRANSACTION\";\n\t\t\t\t\tn->args = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->jumble_args = true;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = -1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| SESSION CHARACTERISTICS AS TRANSACTION transaction_mode_list\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariableSetStmt *n = makeNode(VariableSetStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = VAR_SET_MULTI;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = \"SESSION CHARACTERISTICS\";\n\t\t\t\t\tn->args = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->jumble_args = true;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = -1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| set_rest_more\n\t\t\t;\n\ngeneric_set:\n\t\t\tvar_name TO var_list\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariableSetStmt *n = makeNode(VariableSetStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = VAR_SET_VALUE;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = $1;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->args = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @3;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| var_name '=' var_list\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariableSetStmt *n = makeNode(VariableSetStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = VAR_SET_VALUE;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = $1;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->args = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @3;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| var_name TO DEFAULT\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariableSetStmt *n = makeNode(VariableSetStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = VAR_SET_DEFAULT;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = $1;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = -1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| var_name '=' DEFAULT\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariableSetStmt *n = makeNode(VariableSetStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = VAR_SET_DEFAULT;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = $1;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = -1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nset_rest_more:\t/* Generic SET syntaxes: */\n\t\t\tgeneric_set\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{$$ = $1;}\n\t\t\t| var_name FROM CURRENT_P\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariableSetStmt *n = makeNode(VariableSetStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = VAR_SET_CURRENT;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = $1;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = -1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t/* Special syntaxes mandated by SQL standard: */\n\t\t\t| TIME ZONE zone_value\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariableSetStmt *n = makeNode(VariableSetStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = VAR_SET_VALUE;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = \"timezone\";\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = -1;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->jumble_args = true;\n\t\t\t\t\tif ($3 != NULL)\n\t\t\t\t\t\tn->args = list_make1($3);\n\t\t\t\t\telse\n\t\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = VAR_SET_DEFAULT;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| CATALOG_P Sconst\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"current database cannot be changed\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(@2)));\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = NULL; /*not reached*/\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| SCHEMA Sconst\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariableSetStmt *n = makeNode(VariableSetStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = VAR_SET_VALUE;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = \"search_path\";\n\t\t\t\t\tn->args = list_make1(makeStringConst($2, @2));\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @2;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| NAMES opt_encoding\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariableSetStmt *n = makeNode(VariableSetStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = VAR_SET_VALUE;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = \"client_encoding\";\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @2;\n\t\t\t\t\tif ($2 != NULL)\n\t\t\t\t\t\tn->args = list_make1(makeStringConst($2, @2));\n\t\t\t\t\telse\n\t\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = VAR_SET_DEFAULT;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ROLE NonReservedWord_or_Sconst\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariableSetStmt *n = makeNode(VariableSetStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = VAR_SET_VALUE;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = \"role\";\n\t\t\t\t\tn->args = list_make1(makeStringConst($2, @2));\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @2;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| SESSION AUTHORIZATION = list_make1(makeStringConst($3, @3));\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @3;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| SESSION AUTHORIZATION DEFAULT\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariableSetStmt *n = makeNode(VariableSetStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = VAR_SET_DEFAULT;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = \"session_authorization\";\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = -1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| XML_P OPTION document_or_content\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariableSetStmt *n = makeNode(VariableSetStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = VAR_SET_VALUE;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = \"xmloption\";\n\t\t\t\t\tn->args = list_make1(makeStringConst($3 == XMLOPTION_DOCUMENT ? \"DOCUMENT\" : \"CONTENT\", @3));\n\t\t\t\t\tn->jumble_args = true;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = -1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t/* Special syntaxes invented by PostgreSQL: */\n\t\t\t| TRANSACTION SNAPSHOT Sconst\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariableSetStmt *n = makeNode(VariableSetStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = VAR_SET_MULTI;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = \"TRANSACTION SNAPSHOT\";\n\t\t\t\t\tn->args = list_make1(makeStringConst($3, @3));\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @3;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nvar_name:\tColId\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $1; }\n\t\t\t| var_name '.' ColId\n\t\t\t\t{ $$ = psprintf(\"%s.%s\", $1, $3); }\n\t\t;\n\nvar_list:\tvar_value\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = list_make1($1); }\n\t\t\t| var_list ',' var_value\t\t\t\t{ $$ = lappend($1, $3); }\n\t\t;\n\nvar_value:\topt_boolean_or_string\n\t\t\t\t{ $$ = makeStringConst($1, @1); }\n\t\t\t| NumericOnly\n\t\t\t\t{ $$ = makeAConst($1, @1); }\n\t\t;\n\niso_level:\tREAD UNCOMMITTED\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = \"read uncommitted\"; }\n\t\t\t| READ COMMITTED\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = \"read committed\"; }\n\t\t\t| REPEATABLE READ\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = \"repeatable read\"; }\n\t\t\t| SERIALIZABLE\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = \"serializable\"; }\n\t\t;\n\nopt_boolean_or_string:\n\t\t\tTRUE_P\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = \"true\"; }\n\t\t\t| FALSE_P\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = \"false\"; }\n\t\t\t| ON\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = \"on\"; }\n\t\t\t/*\n\t\t\t * OFF is also accepted as a boolean value, but is handled by\n\t\t\t * the NonReservedWord rule.  The action for booleans and strings\n\t\t\t * is the same, so we don't need to distinguish them here.\n\t\t\t */\n\t\t\t| NonReservedWord_or_Sconst\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $1; }\n\t\t;\n\n/* Timezone values can be:\n * - a string such as 'pst8pdt'\n * - an identifier such as \"pst8pdt\"\n * - an integer or floating point number\n * - a time interval per SQL99\n * ColId gives reduce/reduce errors against ConstInterval and LOCAL,\n * so use IDENT (meaning we reject anything that is a key word).\n */\nzone_value:\n\t\t\tSconst\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeStringConst($1, @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| IDENT\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeStringConst($1, @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ConstInterval Sconst opt_interval\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tTypeName   *t = $1;\n\n\t\t\t\t\tif ($3 != NIL)\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tA_Const\t   *n = (A_Const *) linitial($3);\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif ((n->val.ival.ival & ~(INTERVAL_MASK(HOUR) | INTERVAL_MASK(MINUTE))) != 0)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"time zone interval must be HOUR or HOUR TO MINUTE\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(@3)));\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\tt->typmods = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeStringConstCast($2, @2, t);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ConstInterval '(' Iconst ')' Sconst\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tTypeName   *t = $1;\n\n\t\t\t\t\tt->typmods = list_make2(makeIntConst(INTERVAL_FULL_RANGE, -1),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tmakeIntConst($3, @3));\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeStringConstCast($5, @5, t);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| NumericOnly\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = makeAConst($1, @1); }\n\t\t\t| DEFAULT\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NULL; }\n\t\t\t| LOCAL\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NULL; }\n\t\t;\n\nopt_encoding:\n\t\t\tSconst\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $1; }\n\t\t\t| DEFAULT\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NULL; }\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NULL; }\n\t\t;\n\nNonReservedWord_or_Sconst:\n\t\t\tNonReservedWord\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $1; }\n\t\t\t| Sconst\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $1; }\n\t\t;\n\nVariableResetStmt:\n\t\t\tRESET reset_rest\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = (Node *) $2; }\n\t\t;\n\nreset_rest:\n\t\t\tgeneric_reset\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $1; }\n\t\t\t| TIME ZONE\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariableSetStmt *n = makeNode(VariableSetStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = VAR_RESET;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = \"timezone\";\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = -1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariableSetStmt *n = makeNode(VariableSetStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = VAR_RESET;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = \"transaction_isolation\";\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = -1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| SESSION AUTHORIZATION\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariableSetStmt *n = makeNode(VariableSetStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = VAR_RESET;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = \"session_authorization\";\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = -1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\ngeneric_reset:\n\t\t\tvar_name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariableSetStmt *n = makeNode(VariableSetStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = VAR_RESET;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = $1;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = -1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ALL\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariableSetStmt *n = makeNode(VariableSetStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = VAR_RESET_ALL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = -1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n/* SetResetClause allows SET or RESET without LOCAL */\nSetResetClause:\n\t\t\tSET set_rest\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $2; */\nCheckPointStmt:\n\t\t\tCHECKPOINT\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCheckPointStmt *n = makeNode(CheckPointStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) *****************************************************************************/\n\nDiscardStmt:\n\t\t\tDISCARD ALL\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDiscardStmt *n = makeNode(DiscardStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->target = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t;\n\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\tALTER [ TABLE | INDEX | SEQUENCE | VIEW | MATERIALIZED VIEW | FOREIGN TABLE ] variations\n *\n * Note: we accept all subcommands for each of the variants, and sort\n * out what's really legal at execution time.\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nAlterTableStmt:\n\t\t\tALTER TABLE relation_expr alter_table_cmds\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterTableStmt *n = alter_table_cmds ',' alter_table_cmd\t{ $$ = lappend($1, $3); }\n\t\t;\n\npartition_cmd:\n\t\t\t/* ALTER TABLE <name> ATTACH PARTITION <table_name> FOR VALUES */\n\t\t\tATTACH PARTITION qualified_name AT_AttachPartition;\n\t\t\t\t\tcmd->name = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tcmd->bound = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tcmd->concurrent = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->def = (Node *) cmd;\n\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t/* ALTER TABLE <name> DETACH PARTITION <partition_name> [CONCURRENTLY] */\n\t\t\t| DETACH PARTITION qualified_name opt_concurrently\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterTableCmd *n = *n = makeNode(AlterTableCmd);\n\t\t\t\t\tPartitionCmd *cmd = makeNode(PartitionCmd);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->subtype = AT_DetachPartitionFinalize;\n\t\t\t\t\tcmd->name = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tcmd->bound = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nalter_table_cmd:\n\t\t\t/* ALTER TABLE <name> ADD <coldef> */\n\t\t\tADD_P columnDef\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterTableCmd *n = makeNode(AlterTableCmd);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->subtype = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t/* ALTER TABLE <name> ADD COLUMN <coldef> */\n\t\t\t| ADD_P COLUMN columnDef\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterTableCmd *n = makeNode(AlterTableCmd);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->subtype = (CAS_DEFERRABLE | CAS_NOT_DEFERRABLE |\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t  CAS_INITIALLY_DEFERRED | CAS_INITIALLY_IMMEDIATE))\n\t\t\t\t\t\tc->alterDeferrability = true;\n\t\t\t\t\tif ($4 & makeTypeNameFromNameList($2);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tdef->location = @2;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->subtype = AT_AddOf;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->def = (Node *) def;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t/* ALTER TABLE <name> NOT OF */\n\t\t\t| NOT OF\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterTableCmd *n = makeNode(AlterTableCmd);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->subtype = AT_DropOf;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t/* ALTER TABLE <name> OWNER TO RoleSpec */\n\t\t\t| OWNER TO RoleSpec\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterTableCmd *n = makeNode(AlterTableCmd);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->subtype = AT_ChangeOwner;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->newowner = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t/* ALTER TABLE <name> SET ACCESS METHOD { <amname> | DEFAULT } */\n\t\t\t| SET ACCESS METHOD set_access_method_name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterTableCmd *n = makeNode(AlterTableCmd);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->subtype = AT_SetAccessMethod;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t/* ALTER TABLE <name> SET TABLESPACE <tablespacename> */\n\t\t\t| SET TABLESPACE name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterTableCmd *n = makeNode(AlterTableCmd);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->subtype = AT_SetTableSpace;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t/* ALTER TABLE <name> SET (...) */\n\t\t\t| SET reloptions\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterTableCmd *n = makeNode(AlterTableCmd);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->subtype = AT_SetRelOptions;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->def = (Node *) $2;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t/* ALTER TABLE <name> RESET (...) */\n\t\t\t| RESET reloptions\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterTableCmd *n = makeNode(AlterTableCmd);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->subtype = AT_ResetRelOptions;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->def = (Node *) $2;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t/* ALTER TABLE <name> REPLICA IDENTITY */\n\t\t\t| REPLICA IDENTITY_P replica_identity\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterTableCmd *n = makeNode(AlterTableCmd);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->subtype = AT_ReplicaIdentity;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->def = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t/* ALTER TABLE <name> ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY */\n\t\t\t| ENABLE_P ROW LEVEL SECURITY\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterTableCmd *n = makeNode(AlterTableCmd);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->subtype = AT_EnableRowSecurity;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t/* ALTER TABLE <name> DISABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY */\n\t\t\t| DISABLE_P ROW LEVEL SECURITY\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterTableCmd *n = makeNode(AlterTableCmd);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->subtype = AT_DisableRowSecurity;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t/* ALTER TABLE <name> FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY */\n\t\t\t| FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterTableCmd *n = makeNode(AlterTableCmd);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->subtype = AT_ForceRowSecurity;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t/* ALTER TABLE <name> NO FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY */\n\t\t\t| NO FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterTableCmd *n = makeNode(AlterTableCmd);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->subtype = AT_NoForceRowSecurity;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| alter_generic_options\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterTableCmd *n = makeNode(AlterTableCmd);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->subtype = AT_GenericOptions;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->def = (Node *) $1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nalter_column_default:\n\t\t\tSET DEFAULT a_expr\t\t\t{ $$ = $3; }\n\t\t\t| DROP DEFAULT\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NULL; }\n\t\t;\n\nopt_collate_clause:\n\t\t\tCOLLATE any_name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCollateClause *n = makeNode(CollateClause);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->arg = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->collname = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| /* EMPTY */\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NULL; }\n\t\t;\n\nalter_using:\n\t\t\tUSING a_expr\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $2; }\n\t\t\t| /* EMPTY */\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NULL; }\n\t\t;\n\nreplica_identity:\n\t\t\tNOTHING\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tReplicaIdentityStmt *n = makeNode(ReplicaIdentityStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->identity_type = REPLICA_IDENTITY_NOTHING;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| FULL\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tReplicaIdentityStmt *n = makeNode(ReplicaIdentityStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->identity_type = REPLICA_IDENTITY_FULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| DEFAULT\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tReplicaIdentityStmt *n = makeNode(ReplicaIdentityStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->identity_type = REPLICA_IDENTITY_DEFAULT;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| USING INDEX name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tReplicaIdentityStmt *n = makeNode(ReplicaIdentityStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->identity_type = REPLICA_IDENTITY_INDEX;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n;\n\nreloptions:\n\t\t\t'(' reloption_list ')'\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $2; }\n\t\t;\n\nopt_reloptions:\t\tWITH reloptions\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $2; }\n\t\t\t |\t\t/* EMPTY */\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NIL; }\n\t\t;\n\nreloption_list:\n\t\t\treloption_elem\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = list_make1($1); }\n\t\t\t| reloption_list ',' reloption_elem\t\t{ $$ = lappend($1, $3); }\n\t\t;\n\n/* This should match def_elem and also allow qualified names */\nreloption_elem:\n\t\t\tColLabel '=' def_arg\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem($1, (Node *) $3, @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ColLabel\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem($1, NULL, @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ColLabel '.' ColLabel '=' def_arg\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElemExtended($1, $3, (Node *) $5,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t DEFELEM_UNSPEC, @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ColLabel '.' ColLabel\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElemExtended($1, $3, NULL, DEFELEM_UNSPEC, @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nalter_identity_column_option_list:\n\t\t\talter_identity_column_option\n\t\t\t\t{ $$ = list_make1($1); }\n\t\t\t| alter_identity_column_option_list alter_identity_column_option\n\t\t\t\t{ $$ = lappend($1, $2); }\n\t\t;\n\nalter_identity_column_option:\n\t\t\tRESTART\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"restart\", NULL, @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| RESTART opt_with NumericOnly\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"restart\", (Node *) $3, @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| SET SeqOptElem\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tif (strcmp($2->defname, \"as\") == 0 ||\n\t\t\t\t\t\tstrcmp($2->defname, \"restart\") == 0 ||\n\t\t\t\t\t\tstrcmp($2->defname, \"owned_by\") == 0)\n\t\t\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"sequence option \\\"%s\\\" not supported here\", $2->defname),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(@2)));\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = $2;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| SET GENERATED generated_when\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"generated\", (Node *) makeInteger($3), @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nset_statistics_value:\n\t\t\tSignedIconst\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = (Node *) makeInteger($1); }\n\t\t\t| DEFAULT\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NULL; }\n\t\t;\n\nset_access_method_name:\n\t\t\tColId\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $1; }\n\t\t\t| DEFAULT\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NULL; }\n\t\t;\n\nPartitionBoundSpec:\n\t\t\t/* a HASH partition */\n\t\t\tFOR VALUES WITH '(' hash_partbound ')'\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tListCell   *lc;\n\t\t\t\t\tPartitionBoundSpec *n = makeNode(PartitionBoundSpec);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->strategy = PARTITION_STRATEGY_HASH;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->modulus = n->remainder = -1;\n\n\t\t\t\t\tforeach (lc, $5)\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tDefElem    *opt = lfirst_node(DefElem, lc);\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif (strcmp(opt->defname, \"modulus\") == 0)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif (n->modulus != -1)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_DUPLICATE_OBJECT),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"modulus for hash partition provided more than once\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(opt->location)));\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tn->modulus = defGetInt32(opt);\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t\telse if (strcmp(opt->defname, \"remainder\") == 0)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif (n->remainder != -1)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_DUPLICATE_OBJECT),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"remainder for hash partition provided more than once\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(opt->location)));\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tn->remainder = defGetInt32(opt);\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t\telse\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"unrecognized hash partition bound specification \\\"%s\\\"\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\topt->defname),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(opt->location)));\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\tif (n->modulus == -1)\n\t\t\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"modulus for hash partition must be specified\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(@3)));\n\t\t\t\t\tif (n->remainder == -1)\n\t\t\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"remainder for hash partition must be specified\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(@3)));\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @3;\n\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t/* a LIST partition */\n\t\t\t| FOR VALUES IN_P '(' expr_list ')'\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tPartitionBoundSpec *n = makeNode(PartitionBoundSpec);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->strategy = PARTITION_STRATEGY_LIST;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->is_default = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->listdatums = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @3;\n\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t/* a RANGE partition */\n\t\t\t| FOR VALUES FROM '(' expr_list ')' TO '(' expr_list ')'\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tPartitionBoundSpec *n = makeNode(PartitionBoundSpec);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->strategy = PARTITION_STRATEGY_RANGE;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->is_default = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->lowerdatums = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->upperdatums = $9;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @3;\n\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t/* a DEFAULT partition */\n\t\t\t| DEFAULT\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tPartitionBoundSpec *n = makeNode(PartitionBoundSpec);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->is_default = true;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @1;\n\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nhash_partbound_elem:\n\t\tNonReservedWord Iconst\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem($1, (Node *) makeInteger($2), @1);\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nhash_partbound:\n\t\thash_partbound_elem\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t$$ = list_make1($1);\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t| hash_partbound ',' hash_partbound_elem\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t$$ = lappend($1, $3);\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\tALTER TYPE\n *\n * really variants of the ALTER TABLE subcommands with different spellings\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nAlterCompositeTypeStmt:\n\t\t\tALTER TYPE_P any_name alter_type_cmds\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterTableStmt *n = makeNode(AlterTableStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\t/* can't use qualified_name, sigh */\n\t\t\t\t\tn->relation = makeRangeVarFromAnyName($3, @3, yyscanner);\n\t\t\t\t\tn->cmds = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objtype = OBJECT_TYPE;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t;\n\nalter_type_cmds:\n\t\t\talter_type_cmd\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = list_make1($1); }\n\t\t\t| alter_type_cmds ',' alter_type_cmd\t{ $$ = lappend($1, $3); }\n\t\t;\n\nalter_type_cmd:\n\t\t\t/* ALTER TYPE <name> ADD ATTRIBUTE <coldef> [RESTRICT|CASCADE] */\n\t\t\tADD_P ATTRIBUTE TableFuncElement opt_drop_behavior\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterTableCmd *n = makeNode(AlterTableCmd);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->subtype = AT_AddColumn;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->def = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->behavior = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t/* ALTER TYPE <name> DROP ATTRIBUTE IF EXISTS <attname> [RESTRICT|CASCADE] */\n\t\t\t| DROP ATTRIBUTE IF_P EXISTS ColId opt_drop_behavior\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterTableCmd *n = makeNode(AlterTableCmd);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->subtype = AT_DropColumn;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->behavior = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = true;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t/* ALTER TYPE <name> DROP ATTRIBUTE <attname> [RESTRICT|CASCADE] */\n\t\t\t| DROP ATTRIBUTE ColId opt_drop_behavior\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterTableCmd *n = makeNode(AlterTableCmd);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->subtype = AT_DropColumn;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->behavior = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = false;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t/* ALTER TYPE <name> ALTER ATTRIBUTE <attname> [SET DATA] TYPE <typename> [RESTRICT|CASCADE] */\n\t\t\t| ALTER ATTRIBUTE ColId opt_set_data TYPE_P Typename opt_collate_clause opt_drop_behavior\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterTableCmd *n = makeNode(AlterTableCmd);\n\t\t\t\t\tColumnDef *def = makeNode(ColumnDef);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->subtype = AT_AlterColumnType;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->def = (Node *) def;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->behavior = $8;\n\t\t\t\t\t/* We only use these fields of the ColumnDef node */\n\t\t\t\t\tdef->typeName = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tdef->collClause = (CollateClause *) $7;\n\t\t\t\t\tdef->raw_default = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tdef->location = @3;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\t\tQUERY :\n *\t\t\t\tclose <portalname>\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nClosePortalStmt:\n\t\t\tCLOSE cursor_name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tClosePortalStmt *n = makeNode(ClosePortalStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->portalname = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| CLOSE ALL\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tClosePortalStmt *n = makeNode(ClosePortalStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->portalname = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\t\tQUERY :\n *\t\t\t\tCOPY relname [(columnList)] FROM/TO file [WITH] [(options)]\n *\t\t\t\tCOPY ( query ) TO file\t[WITH] [(options)]\n *\n *\t\t\t\twhere 'query' can be one of:\n *\t\t\t\t{ SELECT | UPDATE | INSERT | DELETE }\n *\n *\t\t\t\tand 'file' can be one of:\n *\t\t\t\t{ PROGRAM 'command' | STDIN | STDOUT | 'filename' }\n *\n *\t\t\t\tIn the preferred syntax the options are comma-separated\n *\t\t\t\tand use generic identifiers instead of keywords.  The pre-9.0\n *\t\t\t\tsyntax had a hard-wired, space-separated set of options.\n *\n *\t\t\t\tReally old syntax, from versions 7.2 and prior:\n *\t\t\t\tCOPY [ BINARY ] table FROM/TO file\n *\t\t\t\t\t[ [ USING ] DELIMITERS 'delimiter' ] ]\n *\t\t\t\t\t[ WITH NULL AS 'null string' ]\n *\t\t\t\tThis option placement is not supported with COPY (query...).\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nCopyStmt:\tCOPY opt_binary qualified_name opt_column_list\n\t\t\tcopy_from opt_program copy_file_name copy_delimiter opt_with\n\t\t\tcopy_options where_clause\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCopyStmt *n = makeNode(CopyStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->relation = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->query = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->attlist = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->is_from = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->is_program = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->filename = $7;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->whereClause = $11;\n\n\t\t\t\t\tif (n->is_program && n->filename == NULL)\n\t\t\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"STDIN/STDOUT not allowed with PROGRAM\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(@8)));\n\n\t\t\t\t\tif (!n->is_from && n->whereClause != NULL)\n\t\t\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"WHERE clause not allowed with COPY TO\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(@11)));\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\t/* Concatenate user-supplied flags */\n\t\t\t\t\tif ($2)\n\t\t\t\t\t\tn->options = lappend(n->options, $2);\n\t\t\t\t\tif ($8)\n\t\t\t\t\t\tn->options = lappend(n->options, $8);\n\t\t\t\t\tif ($10)\n\t\t\t\t\t\tn->options = list_concat(n->options, $10);\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| COPY '(' PreparableStmt ')' TO opt_program copy_file_name opt_with copy_options\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCopyStmt *n = makeNode(CopyStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->relation = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->query = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->attlist = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->is_from = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->is_program = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->filename = $7;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = $9;\n\n\t\t\t\t\tif (n->is_program && n->filename == NULL)\n\t\t\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"STDIN/STDOUT not allowed with PROGRAM\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(@5)));\n\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\ncopy_from:\n\t\t\tFROM\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = true; }\n\t\t\t| TO\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = false; }\n\t\t;\n\nopt_program:\n\t\t\tPROGRAM\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = true; }\n\t\t\t| /* EMPTY */\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = false; }\n\t\t;\n\n/*\n * copy_file_name NULL indicates stdio is used. Whether stdin or stdout is\n * used depends on the direction. (It really doesn't make sense to copy from\n * stdout. We silently correct the \"typo\".)\t\t - AY 9/94\n */\ncopy_file_name:\n\t\t\tSconst\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $1; }\n\t\t\t| STDIN\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NULL; }\n\t\t\t| STDOUT\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NULL; }\n\t\t;\n\ncopy_options: copy_opt_list\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $1; }\n\t\t\t| '(' copy_generic_opt_list ')'\t\t\t{ $$ = $2; }\n\t\t;\n\n/* old COPY option syntax */\ncopy_opt_list:\n\t\t\tcopy_opt_list copy_opt_item\t\t\t\t{ $$ = lappend($1, $2); }\n\t\t\t| /* EMPTY */\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NIL; }\n\t\t;\n\ncopy_opt_item:\n\t\t\tBINARY\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = OptTableSpace\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateStmt *n = makeNode(CreateStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\t$7->relpersistence = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->relation = $7;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->tableElts = $11;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->inhRelations = list_make1($10);\n\t\t\t\t\tn->partbound = $12;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->partspec = $13;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->ofTypename = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->constraints = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->accessMethod = $14;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = $15;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->oncommit = $16;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->tablespacename = $17;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->if_not_exists = true;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n/*\n * Redundancy here is needed to avoid shift/reduce conflicts,\n * since TEMP is not a reserved word.  See also OptTempTableName.\n *\n * NOTE: we accept both GLOBAL and LOCAL options.  They currently do nothing,\n * but future versions might consider GLOBAL to request SQL-spec-compliant\n * temp table behavior, so warn about that.  Since we have no modules the\n * LOCAL keyword is really meaningless; furthermore, some other products\n * implement LOCAL as meaning the same as our default temp table behavior,\n * so we'll probably continue to treat LOCAL as a noise word.\n */\nOptTemp:\tTEMPORARY\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = RELPERSISTENCE_TEMP; }\n\t\t\t| TEMP\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = RELPERSISTENCE_TEMP; }\n\t\t\t| LOCAL TEMPORARY\t\t\t{ $$ = RELPERSISTENCE_TEMP; }\n\t\t\t| LOCAL TEMP\t\t\t\t{ $$ = RELPERSISTENCE_TEMP; }\n\t\t\t| GLOBAL TEMPORARY\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tereport(WARNING,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(errmsg(\"GLOBAL is deprecated in temporary table creation\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(@1)));\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = RELPERSISTENCE_TEMP;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| GLOBAL TEMP\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tereport(WARNING,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(errmsg(\"GLOBAL is deprecated in temporary table creation\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(@1)));\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = RELPERSISTENCE_TEMP;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| UNLOGGED\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = RELPERSISTENCE_UNLOGGED; }\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = RELPERSISTENCE_PERMANENT; }\n\t\t;\n\nOptTableElementList:\n\t\t\tTableElementList\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $1; }\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NIL; }\n\t\t;\n\nOptTypedTableElementList:\n\t\t\t'(' TypedTableElementList ')'\t\t{ $$ = $2; }\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NIL; }\n\t\t;\n\nTableElementList:\n\t\t\tTableElement\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = list_make1($1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| TableElementList ',' $1; }\n\t\t;\n\ncolumnDef:\tColId Typename opt_column_storage opt_column_compression create_generic_options ColQualList\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tColumnDef *n = true;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->is_not_null = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->is_from_type = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->storage = 0;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->raw_default = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->cooked_default = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->collOid = InvalidOid;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->fdwoptions = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tSplitColQualList($6, &n->constraints, &n->collClause,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t yyscanner);\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\ncolumnOptions:\tColId ColQualList\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tColumnDef *n = makeNode(ColumnDef);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->colname = $1;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->typeName = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->inhcount n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\ncolumn_compression:\n\t\t\tCOMPRESSION ColId\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $2; }\n\t\t\t| COMPRESSION DEFAULT\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = pstrdup(\"default\"); ColConstraintElem\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $1; }\n\t\t\t| ConstraintAttr\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $1; }\n\t\t\t| COLLATE any_name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t/*\n\t\t\t\t\t * Note: the CollateClause is momentarily included in\n\t\t\t\t\t * the list built by ColQualList, but we split it out\n\t\t\t\t\t * again in SplitColQualList.\n\t\t\t\t\t */\n\t\t\t\t\tCollateClause *n = makeNode(CollateClause);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->arg = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->collname = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n/* DEFAULT NULL is already the default for Postgres.\n * But define it here and carry it forward into the system\n * to make it explicit.\n * - thomas 1998-09-13\n *\n * WITH NULL and NULL are not SQL-standard syntax elements,\n * so leave them out. Use DEFAULT NULL to explicitly indicate\n * that a column may have that value. WITH NULL leads to\n * shift/reduce conflicts with WITH TIME ZONE anyway.\n * - thomas 1999-01-08\n *\n * DEFAULT expression must be b_expr not a_expr to prevent shift/reduce\n * conflict on NOT (since NOT might start a subsequent NOT NULL constraint,\n * or be part of a_expr NOT LIKE or similar constructs).\n */\nColConstraintElem:\n\t\t\tNOT NULL_P n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| GENERATED generated_when AS '(' a_expr ')' opt_virtual_or_stored\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tConstraint *n = makeNode(Constraint);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->contype = CONSTR_GENERATED;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->generated_when = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->raw_expr = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->cooked_expr = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->generated_kind = $7;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location =
