$7;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ALTER SUBSCRIPTION name SET PUBLICATION name_list opt_definition\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterSubscriptionStmt *n =\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmakeNode(AlterSubscriptionStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = ALTER_SUBSCRIPTION_SET_PUBLICATION;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->subname = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->publication = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = $7;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ALTER SUBSCRIPTION name ENABLE_P\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterSubscriptionStmt *n =\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmakeNode(AlterSubscriptionStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = ALTER_SUBSCRIPTION_ENABLED;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->subname = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = list_make1(makeDefElem(\"enabled\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(Node *) makeBoolean(true), @1));\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ALTER SUBSCRIPTION name DISABLE_P\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterSubscriptionStmt *n =\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmakeNode(AlterSubscriptionStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = ALTER_SUBSCRIPTION_ENABLED;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->subname = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = list_make1(makeDefElem(\"enabled\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(Node *) makeBoolean(false), @1));\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ALTER SUBSCRIPTION name SKIP definition\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterSubscriptionStmt *n =\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmakeNode(AlterSubscriptionStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = ALTER_SUBSCRIPTION_SKIP;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->subname = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n * DROP SUBSCRIPTION [ IF EXISTS ] name\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nDropSubscriptionStmt: DROP SUBSCRIPTION name opt_drop_behavior\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDropSubscriptionStmt *n = makeNode(DropSubscriptionStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->subname = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->behavior = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t|  DROP SUBSCRIPTION IF_P EXISTS name opt_drop_behavior\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDropSubscriptionStmt *n = makeNode(DropSubscriptionStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->subname = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = true;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->behavior = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\t\tQUERY:\tDefine Rewrite Rule\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nRuleStmt:\tCREATE opt_or_replace RULE name AS\n\t\t\tON event TO qualified_name where_clause\n\t\t\tDO opt_instead RuleActionList\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tRuleStmt   *n = makeNode(RuleStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->replace = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->relation = $9;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->rulename = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->whereClause = $10;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->event = $7;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->instead = $12;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->actions = $13;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nRuleActionList:\n\t\t\tNOTHING\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NIL; }\n\t\t\t| RuleActionStmt\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = list_make1($1); }\n\t\t\t| '(' RuleActionMulti ')'\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $2; }\n\t\t;\n\n/* the thrashing around here is to discard \"empty\" statements... */\nRuleActionMulti:\n\t\t\tRuleActionMulti ';' RuleActionStmtOrEmpty\n\t\t\t\t{ if ($3 != NULL)\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = lappend($1, $3);\n\t\t\t\t  else\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = $1;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| RuleActionStmtOrEmpty\n\t\t\t\t{ if ($1 != NULL)\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = list_make1($1);\n\t\t\t\t  else\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nRuleActionStmt:\n\t\t\tSelectStmt\n\t\t\t| InsertStmt\n\t\t\t| UpdateStmt\n\t\t\t| DeleteStmt\n\t\t\t| NotifyStmt\n\t\t;\n\nRuleActionStmtOrEmpty:\n\t\t\tRuleActionStmt\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $1; }\n\t\t\t|\t/*EMPTY*/\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NULL; }\n\t\t;\n\nevent:\t\tSELECT\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = CMD_SELECT; }\n\t\t\t| UPDATE\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = CMD_UPDATE; }\n\t\t\t| DELETE_P\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = CMD_DELETE; }\n\t\t\t| INSERT\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = CMD_INSERT; }\n\t\t ;\n\nopt_instead:\n\t\t\tINSTEAD\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = true; }\n\t\t\t| ALSO\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = false; }\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = false; }\n\t\t;\n\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\t\tQUERY:\n *\t\t\t\tNOTIFY <identifier> can appear both in rule bodies and\n *\t\t\t\tas a query-level command\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nNotifyStmt: NOTIFY ColId notify_payload\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tNotifyStmt *n = makeNode(NotifyStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->conditionname = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->payload = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nnotify_payload:\n\t\t\t',' Sconst\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $2; }\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NULL; }\n\t\t;\n\nListenStmt: LISTEN ColId\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tListenStmt *n = makeNode(ListenStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->conditionname = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nUnlistenStmt:\n\t\t\tUNLISTEN ColId\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tUnlistenStmt *n = makeNode(UnlistenStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->conditionname = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| UNLISTEN '*'\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tUnlistenStmt *n = makeNode(UnlistenStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->conditionname = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\t\tTransactions:\n *\n *\t\tBEGIN / COMMIT / ROLLBACK\n *\t\t(also older versions END / ABORT)\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nTransactionStmt:\n\t\t\tABORT_P opt_transaction opt_transaction_chain\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tTransactionStmt *n = makeNode(TransactionStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = TRANS_STMT_ROLLBACK;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->chain = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = -1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| START TRANSACTION transaction_mode_list_or_empty\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tTransactionStmt *n = makeNode(TransactionStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = TRANS_STMT_START;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = -1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| COMMIT opt_transaction opt_transaction_chain\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tTransactionStmt *n = makeNode(TransactionStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = TRANS_STMT_COMMIT;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->chain = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = -1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ROLLBACK opt_transaction opt_transaction_chain\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tTransactionStmt *n = makeNode(TransactionStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = TRANS_STMT_ROLLBACK;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->chain = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = -1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| SAVEPOINT ColId\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tTransactionStmt *n = makeNode(TransactionStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = TRANS_STMT_SAVEPOINT;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->savepoint_name = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @2;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| RELEASE SAVEPOINT ColId\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tTransactionStmt *n = makeNode(TransactionStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = TRANS_STMT_RELEASE;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->savepoint_name = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @3;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| RELEASE ColId\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tTransactionStmt *n = makeNode(TransactionStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = TRANS_STMT_RELEASE;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->savepoint_name = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @2;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ROLLBACK opt_transaction TO SAVEPOINT ColId\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tTransactionStmt *n = makeNode(TransactionStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = TRANS_STMT_ROLLBACK_TO;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->savepoint_name = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @5;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ROLLBACK opt_transaction TO ColId\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tTransactionStmt *n = makeNode(TransactionStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = TRANS_STMT_ROLLBACK_TO;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->savepoint_name = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @4;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| PREPARE TRANSACTION Sconst\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tTransactionStmt *n = makeNode(TransactionStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = TRANS_STMT_PREPARE;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->gid = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @3;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| COMMIT PREPARED Sconst\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tTransactionStmt *n = makeNode(TransactionStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = TRANS_STMT_COMMIT_PREPARED;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->gid = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @3;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ROLLBACK PREPARED Sconst\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tTransactionStmt *n = makeNode(TransactionStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = TRANS_STMT_ROLLBACK_PREPARED;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->gid = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @3;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nTransactionStmtLegacy:\n\t\t\tBEGIN_P opt_transaction transaction_mode_list_or_empty\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tTransactionStmt *n = makeNode(TransactionStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = TRANS_STMT_BEGIN;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = -1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| END_P opt_transaction opt_transaction_chain\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tTransactionStmt *n = makeNode(TransactionStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = TRANS_STMT_COMMIT;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->chain = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = -1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nopt_transaction:\tWORK\n\t\t\t| TRANSACTION\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\n\t\t;\n\ntransaction_mode_item:\n\t\t\tISOLATION LEVEL iso_level\n\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = makeDefElem(\"transaction_isolation\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t   makeStringConst($3, @3), @1); }\n\t\t\t| READ ONLY\n\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = makeDefElem(\"transaction_read_only\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t   makeIntConst(true, @1), @1); }\n\t\t\t| READ WRITE\n\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = makeDefElem(\"transaction_read_only\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t   makeIntConst(false, @1), @1); }\n\t\t\t| DEFERRABLE\n\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = makeDefElem(\"transaction_deferrable\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t   makeIntConst(true, @1), @1); }\n\t\t\t| NOT DEFERRABLE\n\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = makeDefElem(\"transaction_deferrable\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t   makeIntConst(false, @1), @1); }\n\t\t;\n\n/* Syntax with commas is SQL-spec, without commas is Postgres historical */\ntransaction_mode_list:\n\t\t\ttransaction_mode_item\n\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = list_make1($1); }\n\t\t\t| transaction_mode_list ',' transaction_mode_item\n\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = lappend($1, $3); }\n\t\t\t| transaction_mode_list transaction_mode_item\n\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = lappend($1, $2); }\n\t\t;\n\ntransaction_mode_list_or_empty:\n\t\t\ttransaction_mode_list\n\t\t\t| /* EMPTY */\n\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NIL; }\n\t\t;\n\nopt_transaction_chain:\n\t\t\tAND CHAIN\t\t{ $$ = true; }\n\t\t\t| AND NO CHAIN\t{ $$ = false; }\n\t\t\t| /* EMPTY */\t{ $$ = false; }\n\t\t;\n\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\tQUERY:\n *\t\tCREATE [ OR REPLACE ] [ TEMP ] VIEW <viewname> '('target-list ')'\n *\t\t\tAS <query> [ WITH [ CASCADED | LOCAL ] CHECK OPTION ]\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nViewStmt: CREATE OptTemp VIEW qualified_name opt_column_list opt_reloptions\n\t\t\t\tAS SelectStmt opt_check_option\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tViewStmt   *n = makeNode(ViewStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->view = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->view->relpersistence = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->aliases = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->query = $8;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->replace = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->withCheckOption = $9;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t| CREATE OR REPLACE OptTemp VIEW qualified_name opt_column_list opt_reloptions\n\t\t\t\tAS SelectStmt opt_check_option\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tViewStmt   *n = makeNode(ViewStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->view = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->view->relpersistence = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->aliases = $7;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->query = $10;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->replace = true;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = $8;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->withCheckOption = $11;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t| CREATE OptTemp RECURSIVE VIEW qualified_name '(' columnList ')' opt_reloptions\n\t\t\t\tAS SelectStmt opt_check_option\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tViewStmt   *n = makeNode(ViewStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->view = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->view->relpersistence = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->aliases = $7;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->query = makeRecursiveViewSelect(n->view->relname, n->aliases, $11);\n\t\t\t\t\tn->replace = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = $9;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->withCheckOption = $12;\n\t\t\t\t\tif (n->withCheckOption != NO_CHECK_OPTION)\n\t\t\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"WITH CHECK OPTION not supported on recursive views\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(@12)));\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t| CREATE OR REPLACE OptTemp RECURSIVE VIEW qualified_name '(' columnList ')' opt_reloptions\n\t\t\t\tAS SelectStmt opt_check_option\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tViewStmt   *n = makeNode(ViewStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->view = $7;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->view->relpersistence = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->aliases = $9;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->query = makeRecursiveViewSelect(n->view->relname, n->aliases, $13);\n\t\t\t\t\tn->replace = true;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = $11;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->withCheckOption = $14;\n\t\t\t\t\tif (n->withCheckOption != NO_CHECK_OPTION)\n\t\t\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"WITH CHECK OPTION not supported on recursive views\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(@14)));\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nopt_check_option:\n\t\tWITH CHECK OPTION\t\t\t\t{ $$ = CASCADED_CHECK_OPTION; }\n\t\t| WITH CASCADED CHECK OPTION\t{ $$ = CASCADED_CHECK_OPTION; }\n\t\t| WITH LOCAL CHECK OPTION\t\t{ $$ = LOCAL_CHECK_OPTION; }\n\t\t| /* EMPTY */\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NO_CHECK_OPTION; }\n\t\t;\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\t\tQUERY:\n *\t\t\t\tLOAD \"filename\"\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nLoadStmt:\tLOAD file_name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tLoadStmt   *n = makeNode(LoadStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->filename = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\t\tCREATE DATABASE\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nCreatedbStmt:\n\t\t\tCREATE DATABASE name opt_with createdb_opt_list\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreatedbStmt *n = makeNode(CreatedbStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->dbname = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\ncreatedb_opt_list:\n\t\t\tcreatedb_opt_items\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $1; }\n\t\t\t| /* EMPTY */\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NIL; }\n\t\t;\n\ncreatedb_opt_items:\n\t\t\tcreatedb_opt_item\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = list_make1($1); }\n\t\t\t| createdb_opt_items createdb_opt_item\t{ $$ = lappend($1, $2); }\n\t\t;\n\ncreatedb_opt_item:\n\t\t\tcreatedb_opt_name opt_equal NumericOnly\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem($1, $3, @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| createdb_opt_name opt_equal opt_boolean_or_string\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem($1, (Node *) makeString($3), @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| createdb_opt_name opt_equal DEFAULT\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem($1, NULL, @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n/*\n * Ideally we'd use ColId here, but that causes shift/reduce conflicts against\n * the ALTER DATABASE SET/RESET syntaxes.  Instead call out specific keywords\n * we need, and allow IDENT so that database option names don't have to be\n * parser keywords unless they are already keywords for other reasons.\n *\n * XXX this coding technique is fragile since if someone makes a formerly\n * non-keyword option name into a keyword and forgets to add it here, the\n * option will silently break.  Best defense is to provide a regression test\n * exercising every such option, at least at the syntax level.\n */\ncreatedb_opt_name:\n\t\t\tIDENT\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $1; }\n\t\t\t| CONNECTION LIMIT\t\t\t\t{ $$ = pstrdup(\"connection_limit\"); }\n\t\t\t| ENCODING\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = pstrdup($1); }\n\t\t\t| LOCATION\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = pstrdup($1); }\n\t\t\t| OWNER\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = pstrdup($1); }\n\t\t\t| TABLESPACE\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = pstrdup($1); }\n\t\t\t| TEMPLATE\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = pstrdup($1); }\n\t\t;\n\n/*\n *\tThough the equals sign doesn't match other WITH options, pg_dump uses\n *\tequals for backward compatibility, and it doesn't seem worth removing it.\n */\nopt_equal:\t'='\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\n\t\t;\n\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\t\tALTER DATABASE\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nAlterDatabaseStmt:\n\t\t\tALTER DATABASE name WITH createdb_opt_list\n\t\t\t\t {\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterDatabaseStmt *n = makeNode(AlterDatabaseStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->dbname = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t }\n\t\t\t| ALTER DATABASE name createdb_opt_list\n\t\t\t\t {\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterDatabaseStmt *n = makeNode(AlterDatabaseStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->dbname = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t }\n\t\t\t| ALTER DATABASE name SET TABLESPACE name\n\t\t\t\t {\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterDatabaseStmt *n = makeNode(AlterDatabaseStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->dbname = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = list_make1(makeDefElem(\"tablespace\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(Node *) makeString($6), @6));\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t }\n\t\t\t| ALTER DATABASE name REFRESH COLLATION VERSION_P\n\t\t\t\t {\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterDatabaseRefreshCollStmt *n = makeNode(AlterDatabaseRefreshCollStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->dbname = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t }\n\t\t;\n\nAlterDatabaseSetStmt:\n\t\t\tALTER DATABASE name SetResetClause\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterDatabaseSetStmt *n = makeNode(AlterDatabaseSetStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->dbname = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->setstmt = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\t\tDROP DATABASE [ IF EXISTS ] dbname [ [ WITH ] ( options ) ]\n *\n * This is implicitly CASCADE, no need for drop behavior\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nDropdbStmt: DROP DATABASE name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDropdbStmt *n = makeNode(DropdbStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->dbname = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| DROP DATABASE IF_P EXISTS name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDropdbStmt *n = makeNode(DropdbStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->dbname = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = true;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| DROP DATABASE name opt_with '(' drop_option_list ')'\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDropdbStmt *n = makeNode(DropdbStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->dbname = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| DROP DATABASE IF_P EXISTS name opt_with '(' drop_option_list ')'\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDropdbStmt *n = makeNode(DropdbStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->dbname = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = true;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = $8;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\ndrop_option_list:\n\t\t\tdrop_option\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = list_make1((Node *) $1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| drop_option_list ',' drop_option\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = lappend($1, (Node *) $3);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n/*\n * Currently only the FORCE option is supported, but the syntax is designed\n * to be extensible so that we can add more options in the future if required.\n */\ndrop_option:\n\t\t\tFORCE\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"force\", NULL, @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\t\tALTER COLLATION\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nAlterCollationStmt: ALTER COLLATION any_name REFRESH VERSION_P\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterCollationStmt *n = makeNode(AlterCollationStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->collname = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\t\tALTER SYSTEM\n *\n * This is used to change configuration parameters persistently.\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nAlterSystemStmt:\n\t\t\tALTER SYSTEM_P SET generic_set\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterSystemStmt *n = makeNode(AlterSystemStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->setstmt = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ALTER SYSTEM_P RESET generic_reset\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterSystemStmt *n = makeNode(AlterSystemStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->setstmt = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n * Manipulate a domain\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nCreateDomainStmt:\n\t\t\tCREATE DOMAIN_P any_name opt_as Typename ColQualList\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateDomainStmt *n = makeNode(CreateDomainStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->domainname = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->typeName = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tSplitColQualList($6, &n->constraints, &n->collClause,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t yyscanner);\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nAlterDomainStmt:\n\t\t\t/* ALTER DOMAIN <domain> {SET DEFAULT <expr>|DROP DEFAULT} */\n\t\t\tALTER DOMAIN_P any_name alter_column_default\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterDomainStmt *n = makeNode(AlterDomainStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->subtype = 'T';\n\t\t\t\t\tn->typeName = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->def = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t/* ALTER DOMAIN <domain> DROP NOT NULL */\n\t\t\t| ALTER DOMAIN_P any_name DROP NOT NULL_P\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterDomainStmt *n = makeNode(AlterDomainStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->subtype = 'N';\n\t\t\t\t\tn->typeName = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t/* ALTER DOMAIN <domain> SET NOT NULL */\n\t\t\t| ALTER DOMAIN_P any_name SET NOT NULL_P\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterDomainStmt *n = makeNode(AlterDomainStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->subtype = 'O';\n\t\t\t\t\tn->typeName = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t/* ALTER DOMAIN <domain> ADD CONSTRAINT ... */\n\t\t\t| ALTER DOMAIN_P any_name ADD_P DomainConstraint\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterDomainStmt *n = makeNode(AlterDomainStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->subtype = 'C';\n\t\t\t\t\tn->typeName = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->def = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t/* ALTER DOMAIN <domain> DROP CONSTRAINT <name> [RESTRICT|CASCADE] */\n\t\t\t| ALTER DOMAIN_P any_name DROP CONSTRAINT name opt_drop_behavior\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterDomainStmt *n = makeNode(AlterDomainStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->subtype = 'X';\n\t\t\t\t\tn->typeName = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->behavior = $7;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = false;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t/* ALTER DOMAIN <domain> DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS <name> [RESTRICT|CASCADE] */\n\t\t\t| ALTER DOMAIN_P any_name DROP CONSTRAINT IF_P EXISTS name opt_drop_behavior\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterDomainStmt *n = makeNode(AlterDomainStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->subtype = 'X';\n\t\t\t\t\tn->typeName = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = $8;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->behavior = $9;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = true;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t/* ALTER DOMAIN <domain> VALIDATE CONSTRAINT <name> */\n\t\t\t| ALTER DOMAIN_P any_name VALIDATE CONSTRAINT name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterDomainStmt *n = makeNode(AlterDomainStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->subtype = 'V';\n\t\t\t\t\tn->typeName = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t;\n\nopt_as:\t\tAS\n\t\t\t| /* EMPTY */\n\t\t;\n\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n * Manipulate a text search dictionary or configuration\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nAlterTSDictionaryStmt:\n\t\t\tALTER TEXT_P SEARCH DICTIONARY any_name n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nAlterTSConfigurationStmt:\n\t\t\tALTER TEXT_P SEARCH CONFIGURATION any_name ADD_P MAPPING FOR name_list any_with any_name_list\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterTSConfigurationStmt *n = makeNode(AlterTSConfigurationStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = ALTER_TSCONFIG_ADD_MAPPING;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->cfgname = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->tokentype = $9;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->dicts = $11;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->override = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->replace = false;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ALTER TEXT_P SEARCH CONFIGURATION any_name ALTER MAPPING FOR name_list any_with any_name_list\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterTSConfigurationStmt *n = makeNode(AlterTSConfigurationStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = ALTER_TSCONFIG_ALTER_MAPPING_FOR_TOKEN;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->cfgname = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->tokentype = $9;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->dicts = $11;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->override = true;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->replace = false;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ALTER TEXT_P SEARCH CONFIGURATION any_name ALTER MAPPING REPLACE any_name any_with any_name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterTSConfigurationStmt *n = makeNode(AlterTSConfigurationStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = ALTER_TSCONFIG_REPLACE_DICT;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->cfgname = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->tokentype = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->dicts = list_make2($9,$11);\n\t\t\t\t\tn->override = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->replace = true;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ALTER TEXT_P SEARCH CONFIGURATION any_name ALTER MAPPING FOR name_list REPLACE any_name any_with any_name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterTSConfigurationStmt *n = makeNode(AlterTSConfigurationStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = ALTER_TSCONFIG_REPLACE_DICT_FOR_TOKEN;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->cfgname = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->tokentype = $9;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->dicts = list_make2($11,$13);\n\t\t\t\t\tn->override = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->replace = true;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ALTER TEXT_P SEARCH CONFIGURATION any_name DROP MAPPING FOR name_list\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterTSConfigurationStmt *n = makeNode(AlterTSConfigurationStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = ALTER_TSCONFIG_DROP_MAPPING;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->cfgname = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->tokentype = $9;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = false;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ALTER TEXT_P SEARCH CONFIGURATION any_name DROP MAPPING IF_P EXISTS FOR name_list\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterTSConfigurationStmt *n = makeNode(AlterTSConfigurationStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = ALTER_TSCONFIG_DROP_MAPPING;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->cfgname = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->tokentype = $11;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = true;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n/* Use this if TIME or ORDINALITY after WITH should be taken as an identifier */\nany_with:\tWITH\n\t\t\t| WITH_LA\n\t\t;\n\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n * Manipulate a conversion\n *\n *\t\tCREATE [DEFAULT] CONVERSION <conversion_name>\n *\t\tFOR <encoding_name> TO <encoding_name> FROM <func_name>\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nCreateConversionStmt:\n\t\t\tCREATE opt_default CONVERSION_P any_name FOR Sconst\n\t\t\tTO Sconst FROM any_name\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tCreateConversionStmt *n = makeNode(CreateConversionStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\tn->conversion_name = $4;\n\t\t\t\tn->for_encoding_name = $6;\n\t\t\t\tn->to_encoding_name = $8;\n\t\t\t\tn->func_name = $10;\n\t\t\t\tn->def = $2;\n\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\t\tQUERY:\n *\t\t\t\tCLUSTER (options) [ <qualified_name> [ USING <index_name> ] ]\n *\t\t\t\tCLUSTER [VERBOSE] [ <qualified_name> [ USING <index_name> ] ]\n *\t\t\t\tCLUSTER [VERBOSE] <index_name> ON <qualified_name> (for pre-8.3)\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nClusterStmt:\n\t\t\tCLUSTER '(' utility_option_list ')' qualified_name cluster_index_specification\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tClusterStmt *n = makeNode(ClusterStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->relation = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->indexname = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->params = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| CLUSTER '(' utility_option_list ')'\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tClusterStmt *n = makeNode(ClusterStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->relation = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->indexname = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->params = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t/* unparenthesized VERBOSE kept for pre-14 compatibility */\n\t\t\t| CLUSTER opt_verbose qualified_name cluster_index_specification\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tClusterStmt *n = makeNode(ClusterStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->relation = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->indexname = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->params = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\tif ($2)\n\t\t\t\t\t\tn->params = lappend(n->params, makeDefElem(\"verbose\", NULL, @2));\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t/* unparenthesized VERBOSE kept for pre-17 compatibility */\n\t\t\t| CLUSTER opt_verbose\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tClusterStmt *n = makeNode(ClusterStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->relation = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->indexname = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->params = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\tif ($2)\n\t\t\t\t\t\tn->params = lappend(n->params, makeDefElem(\"verbose\", NULL, @2));\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t/* kept for pre-8.3 compatibility */\n\t\t\t| CLUSTER opt_verbose name ON qualified_name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tClusterStmt *n = makeNode(ClusterStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->relation = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->indexname = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->params = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\tif ($2)\n\t\t\t\t\t\tn->params = lappend(n->params, makeDefElem(\"verbose\", NULL, @2));\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\ncluster_index_specification:\n\t\t\tUSING name\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $2; }\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NULL; }\n\t\t;\n\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\t\tQUERY:\n *\t\t\t\tVACUUM\n *\t\t\t\tANALYZE\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nVacuumStmt: VACUUM opt_full opt_freeze opt_verbose opt_analyze opt_vacuum_relation_list\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tVacuumStmt *n = makeNode(VacuumStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\tif ($2)\n\t\t\t\t\t\tn->options = lappend(n->options,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t makeDefElem(\"full\", NULL, @2));\n\t\t\t\t\tif ($3)\n\t\t\t\t\t\tn->options = lappend(n->options,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t makeDefElem(\"freeze\", NULL, @3));\n\t\t\t\t\tif ($4)\n\t\t\t\t\t\tn->options = lappend(n->options,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t makeDefElem(\"verbose\", NULL, @4));\n\t\t\t\t\tif ($5)\n\t\t\t\t\t\tn->options = true;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nAnalyzeStmt: analyze_keyword opt_verbose opt_vacuum_relation_list\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tVacuumStmt *n = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nutility_option_list:\n\t\t\tutility_option_elem\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = list_make1($1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| utility_option_list ',' utility_option_elem\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = lappend($1, $3);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nanalyze_keyword:\n\t\t\tANALYZE\n\t\t\t| ANALYSE /* British */\n\t\t;\n\nutility_option_elem:\n\t\t\tutility_option_name utility_option_arg\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem($1, $2, @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nutility_option_name:\n\t\t\tNonReservedWord\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $1; }\n\t\t\t| analyze_keyword\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = \"analyze\"; }\n\t\t\t| FORMAT_LA\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = \"format\"; }\n\t\t;\n\nutility_option_arg:\n\t\t\topt_boolean_or_string\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = (Node *) makeString($1); }\n\t\t\t| NumericOnly\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = (Node *) $1; }\n\t\t\t| /* EMPTY */\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NULL; }\n\t\t;\n\nopt_analyze:\n\t\t\tanalyze_keyword\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = true; }\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = false; }\n\t\t;\n\nopt_verbose:\n\t\t\tVERBOSE\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = true; }\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = false; }\n\t\t;\n\nopt_full:\tFULL\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = true; }\n\t\t\t| $3); }\n\t\t;\n\nopt_vacuum_relation_list:\n\t\t\tvacuum_relation_list\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $1; }\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NIL; *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t| EXPLAIN '(' utility_option_list ')' ExplainableStmt\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tExplainStmt *n = makeNode(ExplainStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->query = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nExplainableStmt:\n\t\t\tSelectStmt\n\t\t\t| InsertStmt\n\t\t\t| UpdateStmt\n\t\t\t| DeleteStmt\n\t\t\t| MergeStmt\n\t\t\t| DeclareCursorStmt\n\t\t\t| CreateAsStmt\n\t\t\t| CreateMatViewStmt\n\t\t\t| RefreshMatViewStmt\n\t\t\t| ExecuteStmt\t\t\t\t\t/* by default all are $$=$1 */\n\t\t;\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\t\tQUERY:\n *\t\t\t\tPREPARE <plan_name> [(args, ...)] AS <query>\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nPrepareStmt: PREPARE name prep_type_clause AS PreparableStmt\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tPrepareStmt *n = makeNode(PrepareStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->argtypes = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->query = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nprep_type_clause: '(' type_list ')'\t\t\t{ $$ = $2; }\n\t\t\t\t| /* EMPTY */\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NIL; }\n\t\t;\n\nPreparableStmt:\n\t\t\tSelectStmt\n\t\t\t| InsertStmt\n\t\t\t| UpdateStmt\n\t\t\t| DeleteStmt\n\t\t\t| MergeStmt\t\t\t\t\t\t/* by default all are $$=$1 */\n\t\t;\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n * EXECUTE <plan_name> [(params, ...)]\n * CREATE TABLE <name> AS EXECUTE <plan_name> [(params, ...)]\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nExecuteStmt: EXECUTE name execute_param_clause\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tExecuteStmt *n = $7;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->params = $8;\n\t\t\t\t\tctas->query = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t\tctas->into = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tctas->objtype = OBJECT_TABLE;\n\t\t\t\t\tctas->is_select_into = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tctas->if_not_exists = false;\n\t\t\t\t\t/* cram additional flags into the IntoClause */\n\t\t\t\t\t$4->rel->relpersistence = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\t$4->skipData = !($9);\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) ctas;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| CREATE OptTemp TABLE IF_P NOT EXISTS create_as_target AS\n\t\t\t\tEXECUTE name execute_param_clause opt_with_data\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateTableAsStmt *ctas = makeNode(CreateTableAsStmt);\n\t\t\t\t\tExecuteStmt *n = makeNode(ExecuteStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = $10;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->params = $11;\n\t\t\t\t\tctas->query = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t\tctas->into = $7;\n\t\t\t\t\tctas->objtype = OBJECT_TABLE;\n\t\t\t\t\tctas->is_select_into = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tctas->if_not_exists = true;\n\t\t\t\t\t/* cram additional flags into the IntoClause */\n\t\t\t\t\t$7->rel->relpersistence = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\t$7->skipData = !($12);\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) ctas;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nexecute_param_clause: '(' expr_list ')'\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $2; }\n\t\t\t\t\t| /* EMPTY */\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NIL; }\n\t\t\t\t\t;\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\t\tQUERY:\n *\t\t\t\tDEALLOCATE [PREPARE] = -1;\n\t\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t| DEALLOCATE PREPARE ALL\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tDeallocateStmt *n = makeNode(DeallocateStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\tn->name =
